name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Thirteen challengers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210714-2277-header&t=1&akid=2277%2E2526796%2E1zb9Lq)
Last cycle, Alexandria faced _13 challengers_ who were vying for her seat in the primary. In the coming cycle, we could be facing the same crowded field.
We can expect that there will be another well-funded GOP challenger in this next race. Last year, her GOP opponent in the general election raised $425,000 in just 10 weeks after announcing his run on Fox & Friends. **By the end of the race, he’d raised $10 million to unseat her.**
The truth is, we don’t know what the GOP will throw at us this time. Which is why we must be prepared and hit every monthly goal to ensure we can execute our full plan to fight back against disinformation, continue organizing in our communities, and keep AOC in Congress.
**That's why we're really counting on you, if you're able to pitch in today. We’re 7,922 contributions behind where we need to be in order to be on track to hit our fundraising goals this month.**
[If you're able, please make a donation of $3 or anything you can today. We're counting on your support to power our campaign and keep Alexandria in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210714-2?refcode=em20210714-2277-P&t=21&refcode2=2277_2526796_1zb9Lq&akid=2277%2E2526796%2E1zb9Lq)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210714-2?refcode=em20210714-2277-P&t=22&refcode2=2277_2526796_1zb9Lq&akid=2277%2E2526796%2E1zb9Lq)**
We couldn't do this without you.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210714-2?refcode=em20210714-2277-P&t=23&refcode2=2277_2526796_1zb9Lq&akid=2277%2E2526796%2E1zb9Lq)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: Do you support critical race theory?

Peter,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb5e348215a47018b7b4ad7e0b3c180&_e=KT4dr532hiqReFsjSBS7Nm2oaMFKG9-9oBH79xtnO5L-NC2zgmRS3e_LBKJdfnXuyYRUddzmMDlJIDlofdno3QBXt8TKSJ-bQ97nLgK8AeOeAYivIXj67WF36SHUkwGjUCCR34lmbZAwR1HnLPKbZFecwmUH-akg8gucRc7ksqhdk7p4PfswMh5N3yZr8rbAQ_XdMlJ50vb_H_9C7I1buxfLaQBhtiRiELu7c-Vyo47_LOAG0LvW22fArqfUbHVINdD4R3FKa1h9_KLUVXfFjamJRYxvOdg9Ma-QL_X_vMNryiZx7sT8gs-ddDqg4mNjlzhpCGbafZj3Bc7net83N_Bj5IgjdaO5xgu-Egj7hGG-JYGBfTfQ_vGoVrGAVTO-tN_I9Ybv3QJXSpkqw0gQjLKg72nS3pCRokC5ZuACaEYttNTepLSRGHJiwPhdvXsEQwhCaMKeHmfd9S9qPBbRbfSwdk-8ubTC_oMySCAEPbop22A0nLiyuSXGLVFZdonSbxoOaRi0UeOoANVUTViEhA%3D%3D)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Peter, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb5e348215a47018b7b4ad7e0b3c180&_e=KT4dr532hiqReFsjSBS7Nm2oaMFKG9-9oBH79xtnO5L-NC2zgmRS3e_LBKJdfnXuyYRUddzmMDlJIDlofdno3QBXt8TKSJ-bQ97nLgK8AeOeAYivIXj67WF36SHUkwGjUCCR34lmbZAwR1HnLPKbZFecwmUH-akg8gucRc7ksqhdk7p4PfswMh5N3yZr8rbAQ_XdMlJ50vb_H_9C7I1buxfLaQBhtiRiELu7c-Vyo47_LOAG0LvW22fArqfUbHVINdD4R3FKa1h9_KLUVXfFjamJRYxvOdg9Ma-QL_X_vMNryiZx7sT8gs-ddDqg4mNjQexo3B2hfnN_cxZf4gjiMwmp1Au0Oiz9-e3X6Y81OgB42P0RDsPZHXwh7iXVNI6s_e-7rt5sEJcUZjPEQiOMmKeBArDm3utUKh7yz6gebgwMIU34VkyeqrSiC3xN99OhZRd9JItXnfqkMAEw57MQjt2d5nAcLMqc-hrp6txEvCCOtokYgzw4UhySA5e-guWEeL4YtdFD5Q7HtA4a-eU_7w%3D%3D)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: Tuesday, July 13th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb5e348215a47018b7b4ad7e0b3c180&_e=KT4dr532hiqReFsjSBS7Nm2oaMFKG9-9oBH79xtnO5L-NC2zgmRS3e_LBKJdfnXuyYRUddzmMDlJIDlofdno3QBXt8TKSJ-bQ97nLgK8AeOeAYivIXj67WF36SHUkwGjUCCR34lmbZAwR1HnLPKbZFecwmUH-akg8gucRc7ksqhdk7p4PfswMh5N3yZr8rbAQ_XdMlJ50vb_H_9C7I1buxfLaQBhtiRiELu7c-Vyo47_LOAG0LvW22fArqfUbHVINdD4R3FKa1h9_KLUVXfFjamJRYxvOdg9Ma-QL_X_vMNryiZx7sT8gs-ddDqg4mNjEVFV8nR-TviM46nMYVx2Myft5ngWRV4mDDyNfV-HsCHmDv7yitxpPAY832rttNUdLaaCttPZjg-Y-DTLdw1CFNKd2jpPMCmIZazFNBrp3_8FDMAdY5x_bIXrHccxWyttj6ovWhEKMjunuu6BQb2wbwET38Y8JIonvYrKbMMW7aceH6JO3ewI9NU7IehBRCgzD6ZaIPY1zRGBEwUc5CPgQg%3D%3D)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ _e pluribus unum_ ” – out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Peter, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It’s so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb5e348215a47018b7b4ad7e0b3c180&_e=KT4dr532hiqReFsjSBS7Nm2oaMFKG9-9oBH79xtnO5L-NC2zgmRS3e_LBKJdfnXuyYRUddzmMDlJIDlofdno3QBXt8TKSJ-bQ97nLgK8AeOeAYivIXj67WF36SHUkwGjUCCR34lmbZAwR1HnLPKbZFecwmUH-akg8gucRc7ksqhdk7p4PfswMh5N3yZr8rbAQ_XdMlJ50vb_H_9C7I1buxfLaQBhtiRiELu7c-Vyo47_LOAG0LvW22fArqfUbHVINdD4R3FKa1h9_KLUVXfFjamJRYxvOdg9Ma-QL_X_vMNryiZx7sT8gs-ddDqg4mNjZX3x7aN9f_B334O304qGKUBAwZLFADxGkBfz__A465kDwlW5uq6ibBBh4ZjnXBvQ6WxayKgR0t0UO6efU0I8T_ZPb-_ZavcBUz5He8f_9CycMPZBntzXWurG_iASrM87ikXIzF-gILM5GiOT8r7268zVI2ZOaTySU4W7eyzIRR_n0pjBn8zBpORFIrRTUqdga9srg1PUcOUdU4QKO8Gvbg%3D%3D)**.

Thank you,
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb5e348215a47018b7b4ad7e0b3c180&_e=KT4dr532hiqReFsjSBS7Nm2oaMFKG9-9oBH79xtnO5L-NC2zgmRS3e_LBKJdfnXuyYRUddzmMDlJIDlofdno3QBXt8TKSJ-bQ97nLgK8AeOeAYivIXj67WF36SHUkwGjUCCR34lmbZAwR1HnLPKbZFecwmUH-akg8gucRc7ksqhdk7p4PfswMh5N3yZr8rbAQ_XdMlJ50vb_H_9C7I1buxfLaQBhtiRiELu7c-Vyo47_LOAG0LvW22fArqfUbHVINdD4R3FKa1h9_KLUVXfFjamJRYxvOdg9Ma-QL_X_vMNryiZx7sT8gs-ddDqg4mNjDnR8DcUSNzcM8t-r4AEZnNLbnYRYPlhwE9t8uWs7ZIcW9FuTV5mN-uQa4EmoSKD-x5rGwrG6zcbmA_wVho0AX9mbveYv0PRZPOJ5HnTY-EGW4SXogMU3RB6oDf9lkWNWU7mDpm84ane9ayjFDZ9btNI8I-fZc7IHaKcDcVy7JBYSavCoZzFqSMchhSLXBmKSQy4iBP_e--E9XT03cM0y3A%3D%3D)

| Fellow Conservative,
---
| Hey Friend -- thought you’d find this interesting:

A new study from Pew breaks out the different “political classifications” of each party... outlining the four core voter groups per party and what they believe.

**[Take a look:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c4ab7ec18084650bd679a21377b5428&_e=rDrdVkeRbernYqVxCNbOonURhKVY-rz3vIReKbnYdumh2yZr0u3EHIKt2l2uA0sKCb_4GmcdruOKq47DwiNJdIK4HkZ1c_EU0u3smvQiCa_ehDEQDT2BJbiFCERkS5qKKrxnJv4oGdIKYF8U31yxMJO3QCCad4SnPZmMF_NYNRon-A_LUuYpLmZWDHhLXdOWPTow6TZUx2dhNhC50aYA1i0_YNXPh-eLSn2aW_anfZUlUZeYqXmLBbzSD-dajpxboPRsRA63Ktq3Mv-l7CCB1wJewrQsbgFHeu0oju6mjJ1K5qlWYKBWO5s_Xe47yJPz5Kx5cNpl1l1RLeCP8iM6tNXx7g1zoIGfu1M6iLDeOng%3D "Take a look:")**
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c4ab7ec18084650bd679a21377b5428&_e=rDrdVkeRbernYqVxCNbOonURhKVY-rz3vIReKbnYdumh2yZr0u3EHIKt2l2uA0sKCb_4GmcdruOKq47DwiNJdIK4HkZ1c_EU0u3smvQiCa_ehDEQDT2BJbiFCERkS5qKKrxnJv4oGdIKYF8U31yxMEztxNufj4Sy8OMJx3A0bu5rT-3ITDjD6ae05ImXzBaN0YJh9auV7eoSt7UwBXpp7V-7X7PapFd764tNkmdf6ZNZ3lhDjkDfArTgFLAvqCIsJK73Teo_9yiMR2RPafSO1K7txJp8tPmdARNDkw2kJUKoRZD0uchoD1a499PPhFV_PBVbT2fASFncGr5isVgV8vXpEiVwq7Tjc8ZtHyMpT2M%3D)
---
| One that caught my eye? **“Devout and diverse” Democrats.** (Basically, churchgoing Black and Hispanic Christians.)

If you look at the chart, you can see how stark it is: **this group is _much_ more conservative than literally all other Democrats.** Heck, on the actual issues, they’re actually more conservative than some _Republican_ groups.

More likely to be pro-life. More likely to support border security. More likely to oppose the globalist agenda.
I bring this up, because this is core to our mission at Red Renaissance: **REACH conservative Democrats in minority communities** ... who have always pulled the lever for Team Blue without even realizing _why_ ... and **win their support for conservative candidates.** I’m a Black conservative from Baltimore, Friend. I know my community. I know how conservative Black Americans think... and **I know how to win them over.**

**The only thing Red Renaissance doesn’t yet have? The resources to take this fight national.**

**[Will you come through with just $9 to fund Red Renaissance’s efforts to turn conservative Black Democrats into loyal Republican voters?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c4ab7ec18084650bd679a21377b5428&_e=rDrdVkeRbernYqVxCNbOonURhKVY-rz3vIReKbnYdumh2yZr0u3EHIKt2l2uA0sKCb_4GmcdruOKq47DwiNJdIK4HkZ1c_EU0u3smvQiCa_ehDEQDT2BJbiFCERkS5qKlcxImv1deip7Hbjuts_mdiwidDenSBTVsaOm409ShcaWSdEEEq0aKD36X0OXw6cQgyMSWr0swKtvo1BJ7nBki_XgQ8m21l5FxWdkmqDMWpSQURJlg3byLeOkmvth0YPaYwWYtzQr4oBzbB7_vs3mMRmf9OvG4ftflF4GEQsJJBGK6mjhWK2kGmqeQgqR2jF7kBXJcDJq9f84tNXC0ZgNL5utYS_l9OCx2pzXJNQocJ0%3D "Will you come through with just $9 to fund Red Renaissance’s efforts to turn conservative Black Democrats into loyal Republican voters?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, | Hey Friend -- thought you’d find this interesting: A new study from Pew breaks out the different “political classifications” of each party... outlining the four core voter groups per party and what they believe. "Take a look:" | | One that caught my eye? “Devout and diverse” Democrats. (Basically, churchgoing Black and Hispanic Christians.) If you look at the chart, you can see how stark it is: this group is much more conservative than literally all other Democrats. Heck, on the actual issues, they’re actually more conservative than some Republican groups. More likely to be pro-life. More likely to support border security. More likely to oppose the globalist agenda. I bring this up, because this is core to our mission at Red Renaissance: REACH conservative Democrats in minority communities ... who have always pulled the lever for Team Blue without even realizing why ... and win their support for conservative candidates. I’m a Black conservative from Baltimore, Friend. I know my community. I know how conservative Black Americans think... and I know how to win them over. The only thing Red Renaissance doesn’t yet have? The resources to take this fight national. "Will you come through with just $9 to fund Red Renaissance’s efforts to turn conservative Black Democrats into loyal Republican voters?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Kim “

name: AMERICAN RESCUE PLAN UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: 24 More responses needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you rate American Rescue Plans' support for children and families? | | | | ****_**RATE THE AMERICAN RESCUE PLAN**_****

President Biden and our Congressional Majorities passed the American Rescue Plan -- and introduced tax credits to cut child poverty in _HALF_.

But not a SINGLE House Republican voted in support of it, and we're _APPALLED_.

**Now we need to know what our best grassroots Democrats think -- so will you rate American Rescue Plans ' support for children and families?**
****
---
[EXCELLENT ➞](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
[GOOD ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
[FAIR ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2k-)
[UNSURE ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/78ZXTZ3eq~)
**24 Responses from your area needed by midnight**

President Biden and our AMAZING Congressional Majorities passed the American Rescue Plan to get our country back on track.

This legislation is expected to cut child poverty in HALF!

But here's the shocking news: Not a **SINGLE** House Republican voted in support of the American Rescue Plan.

So now, we're more fired up than EVER BEFORE to protect our House Majority and continue building on all the progress we've made.

_**But we can 't defend our House Majority unless our grassroots Democrats are behind us every step of the way, so we need to know what you think.**_ **
[Before midnight, will you RATE the American Rescue Plan and its plan to end child poverty?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)****** | [EXCELLENT ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQy~)
---
[GOOD ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
[FAIR ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
[UNSURE ➞](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
Thanks,

DCCC
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Democrats Find Another Issue to Exploit
body:
Democrats aren’t really trying to find a solution to a problem...
Democrats aren't really trying to find a solution to a problem... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Democrats Find Another Issue to Exploit](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats continue to exploit race, in election after election - and get away with it. Even though the facts are not on their side. We take a look at those facts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Democrats Reap What They Sow](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats have been pushing "defund the police" for the last year or so. Now they're trying to say "no, it's actually Republicans who want to defund police." Will it work? Read about the battle in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Critical Race Theory](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-u/)
America is the land of the free and the home of the brave, right? Well, not everyone thinks so. Read about "critical race theory" in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Dems Are Doing a Great Deal of Damage to Our Country](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlktvuy-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the White House. And they're doing a lot of damage with that power. It's past time we fight back. You can read about it in this week's blog. body:

I came to Congress to stand up to a Democrat party that believes THEY will decide when you can leave your house or go to church. I came to Congress to fight against socialists in the Democrat Party who hate our nation and our allies and cheer at our downfall. That makes me a problem for the Jihad Squad, and **[they are coming after me with everything they have. So I need your IMMEDIATE help to fight back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57937766:JwYSrfllN:m:1:3103520637:DB4B79FA61F34B5BCDB73C07AAF3221C:r "they are coming after me with everything they have. So I need your
IMMEDIATE help to fight back.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57937766:JwYSrfllN:m:1:3103520637:DB4B79FA61F34B5BCDB73C07AAF3221C:r "Headline") Now, they are demanding that Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy take "immediate action" against me. I will not _cower in fear every time they run to the teacher 's office to tattle on me._ The Squad is pushing forward with a measure to expel me from Congress, and Nancy Pelosi will do their bidding. Over three dozen Democrats are signing on to the Squad's actions to keep me from having a voice in Congress while these terrorists run wild. **_Our nation is being stolen from us, piece by piece, and the Squad tries to shout us down when we stand up. Our nation 's most important ally, Israel, is being attacked by terrorists, and the Jihad Squad applauds._** Their attack on me is an attack on YOU. They want the attention placed on me, so people will stop focusing on their attempts to destroy our nation from inside the hallowed Halls of Congress, and they now know that with you on my side, they'll never succeed. We need to send them a message - we won't be shouted down, we won't let them destroy America, and we will never abandon Israel. **[We will stand, and we will FIGHT.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57937766:JwYSrfllN:m:1:3103520637:DB4B79FA61F34B5BCDB73C07AAF3221C:r "We will stand, and we will FIGHT.")** They don't scare me, **[and I hope they don't scare you.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57937766:JwYSrfllN:m:1:3103520637:DB4B79FA61F34B5BCDB73C07AAF3221C:r "and I hope they don’t scare you.")** Thank you for your support. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57937766:JwYSrfllN:m:1:3103520637:DB4B79FA61F34B5BCDB73C07AAF3221C:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: me, Scalise, DeSantis (2)
subject: Peter, this is the most important email you'll read this year. 📨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.
Hello, it's Steve Scalise here following up for Ron DeSantis.
**This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.**
President Trump made it crystal clear that he needs ALL Conservatives \-- including me, you, and Ron -- to do our part to defend our America first movement.
[**Ron asked for your help. Now I'm asking for it too. Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57938551:6lhR1flNZ:m:1:3253819041:1E5E6E8028B8A7044490062DD549FAA7:r)
If $25 or $50 is too much, I completely understand. Every little bit helps when the stakes are this high. Even just $5 or $10 can make a world of difference.
Please send in support before it's too late. We really need you.
_\-- Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)_
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57938551:6lhR1flNZ:m:1:3253819041:1E5E6E8028B8A7044490062DD549FAA7:r)
From: **Ron DeSantis**
Subject: You know me. I'm not one to mince words.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57938552:6lhR1flNZ:m:1:3253819041:1E5E6E8028B8A7044490062DD549FAA7:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57938551:6lhR1flNZ:m:1:3253819041:1E5E6E8028B8A7044490062DD549FAA7:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,

body:
On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of welcoming President Joe Biden to Philadelphia--proudly standing with him as he called out the Republican assault on our voting rights as one of the most urgent challenges of our time. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425153/295721361/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=&emci=821e5ec9-3de5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c46bcfc3-6ae5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of welcoming President Joe Biden to Philadelphia--proudly standing with him as he called out the Republican assault on our voting rights as one of the most urgent challenges of our time. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of both our President and our democracy, and both have a special place in the hearts of Pennsylvanians. That’s why President Biden chose Philadelphia -- where the founding fathers first codified into law the ideal of equality and the right to vote -- to deliver his impassioned remarks. He wanted to ensure that all Americans understood that we cannot stand by and allow our democracy to be torn asunder by Republicans shamelessly trying to limit folks who look like me from voting. [**President Biden can’t protect our democracy alone. He needs strong allies in the U.S. Senate to fight back against GOP voter suppression. Help me raise $1,000 towards my listening tour as I explore a run for Senate to help protect our voting rights!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425154/295721362/1593055288?refcode=E10186-20210715-BidenSpeech1-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-EG&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425155/295721363/1593055288?refcode=E10186-20210715-BidenSpeech1-graphic-Biden-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-EG&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’m very proud to have worked alongside Governor Wolf to push back against GOP voter suppression in Pennsylvania, and to fight back when Trump called for another bogus audit of the Pennsylvania 2020 elections as he spreads his Big Lie.
But we can’t just put out these fires one at a time, we need federal action. We need the U.S. Congress to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. When I am elected Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator, I promise that I will continue my passionate defense of our right to vote!
**[But first, I need your help to listen to the voters of Pennsylvania. If you can, donate $](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425162/295721370/1894065836?refcode=E10186-20210715-BidenSpeech1-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=)**[**15 to support my listening tour of PA voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425163/295721371/1894065836?refcode=E10186-20210715-BidenSpeech1-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=)

Sharif is the son of John Street, a hotdog vendor who became Mayor of Philadelphia, and Helen Street-Mosee, a retired school teacher. They raised him and his 3 siblings in North Philadelphia where he now lives with his wife, April. Will you help him make history by **[pitching in a donation to his exploratory committee today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32425171/295721381/-4809367?refcode=E10186-20210715-BidenSpeech1-footer-Biden-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-EG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDZiY2ZjMy02YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px_8Fm7-GDd8MbF55l40ahusm7bzerUyF3szw12ePzQ=)**

clean_body: On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of welcoming President Joe Biden to Philadelphia--proudly standing with him as he called out the Republican assault on our voting rights as one of the most urgent challenges of our time. | | On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of welcoming President Joe Biden to Philadelphia--proudly standing with him as he called out the Republican assault on our voting rights as one of the most urgent challenges of our time. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of both our President and our democracy, and both have a special place in the hearts of Pennsylvanians. That’s why President Biden chose Philadelphia -- where the founding fathers first codified into law the ideal of equality and the right to vote -- to deliver his impassioned remarks. He wanted to ensure that all Americans understood that we cannot stand by and allow our democracy to be torn asunder by Republicans shamelessly trying to limit folks who look like me from voting. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m very proud to have worked alongside Governor Wolf to push back against GOP voter suppression in Pennsylvania, and to fight back when Trump called for another bogus audit of the Pennsylvania 2020 elections as he spreads his Big Lie. But we can’t just put out these fires one at a time, we need federal action. We need the U.S. Congress to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: I'm making a 2022 endorsement right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who
disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it.
The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal
attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we
believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for
office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared
beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares
our values.
My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year,
Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in
Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had
she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina
Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKEHELP ME GET MONICA TO
WASHINGTON»

Will you please chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now to
help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat
she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily
overcome with the right message and enough support. Monica has my
endorsement, but she won't be able to pull off a win for
Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before July
31st, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize
her goal. Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a
Latina Republican to Congress?

HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»

We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof
of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set
your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a
single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships,
Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream.
Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up
to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what
hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to
deliver for her community.

Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back
the House, and I can tell you that Monica's race is one of the
best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!

On behalf of my friend Monica, I'm asking you to give generously
- whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire
Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress

Chip In Today! ⇒

Paid for by Monica for Congress

We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe, click
here.

body:
Glenn Youngkin must condemn him.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32429894/295738354/-2023814932?refcode=20210715.1_TK_7AW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzE0YzkzYy03MWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JaM-4K4pQPbfdQudc4NjqZEa53_XdebDnGVGAMkn3GI=)

| | Derek, in case you missed it, Donald Trump just issued another statement endorsing Glenn Youngkin. In a moment, I’m going to tell you why that statement should scare the daylights out of anyone who cares about the future of Virginia. [**But first, I’m asking you to rush a contribution right now to help my friend Terry McAuliffe defeat Trump and Glenn Youngkin this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32429895/295738363/1097049879?refcode=20210715.1_TK_7AW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzE0YzkzYy03MWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JaM-4K4pQPbfdQudc4NjqZEa53_XdebDnGVGAMkn3GI=) In the endorsement, Trump called the 2020 election a “scam” and alleged that “vote counters” might steal the election from Youngkin. Derek, we know what Trump is up to. He’s using the same baseless lies about voter fraud he used to incite the January 6th insurrection. It’s a blatant attempt to bring his “big lie” to Virginia’s elections and it should be condemned by anyone who cares about the future of our Commonwealth and our Democracy. _**That includes Glenn Youngkin.**_ Instead of calling Trump out, Glenn won the Republican nomination by refusing to accept the truth about Trump losing, buying into the "big lie" about the election being stolen. Now he’s making voter suppression a major focus of his campaign. Derek, if it wasn’t clear already, we urgently need to come together so Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate doesn’t become Virginia’s next Governor. [**To match Youngkin’s deep pockets, Terry needs to build the largest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia. name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: Do it for the kids.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
This week confirmed, the TN GOP House Supermajority doesn't care about children.
Dear Tennessean,

In case you missed the news cycle this week, the GOP House Supermajority and their governor puppet made a lot of questionable decisions... AT THE EXPENSE OF CHILDREN'S LIVES. Here's a quick recap:
After GOP lawmakers interrogated with no merits Tennessee's top COVID official, Dr. Fiscus, lawmakers collaborated with Governor Lee to fire her even as COVID cases rose again. GOP lawmakers then pressured Lee's administration to halt the promotion or outreach for any children's vaccines- this includes vaccines for deadly diseases like HPV, hepatitis, or polio.
THEN, in an effort to score back cheap political points, lawmakers in the GOP House Supermajority used unaccompanied vulnerable children waiting to be reunited with their families to create a distraction- further promoting fake news about unaccompanied children and putting their lives at risk.
All of this on top of the GOP House Supermajority's already destructive inability to take action on behalf of children- underfunding schools, totally mismanaging TANF funds, and a crumbling healthcare system where more than a dozen rural hospitals have closed. Did I mention youth firearm deaths are at an all time high and rather than addressing it, GOP House lawmakers passed a law to make it easier for criminals to get guns?
We must stop the continued destruction from the GOP House lawmakers. We must win back seats and end the GOP House Supermajority. Children in Tennessee deserve a legislature who fights for every single Tennessean, especially those without a voice.
Our children need us to protect them.
**[$5, $10, $100, every cent goes toward protecting our children and stopping Bill Lee. Will you join us by making a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32433880/295754065/-919493873?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjkxZjBmZC03OWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqaQMdOPlPZL0XTUu52Bq0tTsQhFA2OZ5m0gH_4nJZc=#)**
Let's do it for the kids,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

name: Erica Smith
subject: I KNOW it is possible to win our primary and this Senate seat, especially if our campaign can raise the remaining $869 we need to reach $8,000 before midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
A lot of people are doubting us.
#
A lot of people are doubting us. Saying it’s not possible for a progressive Black woman to win the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.
Maybe it’s not. Maybe next year, I’ll still be a teacher and a preacher just changing one heart and mind at a time.
But maybe it is possible. No — **I KNOW it is possible to win our primary and this Senate seat, especially if our campaign can raise the remaining $869 we need to reach $8,000 before midnight tonight.**
We are coming together, one donation at a time, to say that we are ready for change and that we are the change makers. And well, you can’t spell "America" without "Erica."
[**_Is there any way you could please make a donation of $5, $10, $27, or any amount to our campaign before midnight? This is your final chance to make an impact before our mid-month fundraising deadline._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5417?refcode=em20210715-257&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=257%2E3698%2EWbCO6W)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5417?refcode=em20210715-257&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=257%2E3698%2EWbCO6W)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210715-257-footer&t=21&refcode2=257_3698_WbCO6W&akid=257%2E3698%2EWbCO6W)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=257%2E3698%2EWbCO6W)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=257%2E3698%2EWbCO6W)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Don’t be a Snitch!
body:
Someone sent me an announcement posted by the FBI this week, and my jaw was on the floor.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
Patriot,

Someone sent me an announcement posted by the FBI this week, and my jaw was on the floor.

The official tweet by the Federal Bureau of Investigations read:

Basically, the top law enforcement agency in our nation has lowered itself to asking you to snitch on your family.

**And it 's working.**
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
Earlier this week, the entire Munn family was arrested in Texas for participating in the January 6th protest.

Parents Thomas and Dawn Munn were taken into custody along with their children, Josh, Kristi and their **18-year-old daughter Kayli**.

**One of their family members turned them into the FBI for going to Washington.**

These aren't new tactics. Stalin and Castro were notorious for pressuring family members to snitch on each other.

After I read about the Munn family, I was reminded of Peter Keup's story.

Mr. Keup grew up in East Germany.

When he was 22, he planned his escape from the socialist regime, but he was swiftly caught, arrested, interrogated for 40 hours, and then sentenced to prison.

After 10-months as prisoner number 13-1, Mr. Keup was released thanks to the West German government paying a ransom for his freedom.

Decades later, Mr. Keup obtained his file from the Stasi Records Agency to find that his own brother was _inoffizieller Mitarbeiter_ - an unofficial Stasi collaborator.

The East German government recruited tens of thousands of its citizens to keep watch on their own family members and friends. They reported any incident of "disloyalty" to their government.

**Now - and with no exaggeration -- the FBI is openly doing the exact same thing here in America under the Biden Regime.**
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
We're well on our way down the slide toward socialism . . . **and we 're gonna hit the bottom soon**.

It's easy for Republican politicians and members of the conservative media to throw around the word "socialist", but what are they doing to stop actual Stasi tactics from being deployed against American citizens?

Few will stand up and call out the FBI's tactics for what they are: **grotesque abuses of power that have been deployed by the most evil regimes in human history**.

Congress needs a history lesson, and [**I 'm asking you to help me get to Congress to give them one**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ).
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
It's also important to sit down with your friends and extended family and have a sober talk with them about our nation and their loyalties.

More of our households need to abide by this strict code that was first penned by Thomas Aquinas in the 1200's:
_" Pro Deo, Familia, Patria"

It means: For God, Family, Country_
Western Civilization is built on the bedrock of faith, family and country, and we owe a debt of gratitude and loyalty to each . . . **in that order**.

God, Family, Country.

It's a simple code to live by that should never be betrayed.

And yet, our own government is asking us to do just that.

So please, [**help me win a seat in Congress in the upcoming Mid-Term Elections**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ) and know that I will always understand, respect and fight for your freedom to live by that ancient code in your own home.

And I will work to beat back overreaching government agencies that openly ask your family members to betray each other.
**I 'm with you. I'm one of you. And I am by your side in adhering to our shared code of _Pro Deo, Familia, Patria_.**
[**Help me fight for you, your family and America by donating as much as you can today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)

With Respect and Loyalty,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Leftists have worked for years to undermine Judeo-Christian values and the family unit. Our code of loyalty is a threat to their power as they want us to abide by their socialist code. [**Help me get to Congress and I will stand on the House floor daily and fight for our shared American values.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kuNcbUY8kKieX16u2tGMcA/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)

Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/u892892b7A0dsp7nuxLBtbyETQ)

body:
Democrats know that they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans like they once did. Now, they use false accusations against the R Democrats know that they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans like they once did. Now, they use false accusations against the Republican Party, racist rhetoric in the media and culture to oppress us and lay claim on our votes. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d2f24af7e8944f0381f51f832a3e0f59&_e=jNenfG47QCAazYqzzPnW2CHwXT3pEUXZ09GcKcNHW9jdo2JVry9WACZoXyKojfXQevvNFBc1Hx9gg79UVba0MYaNA7v6cPV_9W0wlcB_p2Ky0HFMiY7xkXP04ue9daXy5x65JJNsVugzeYHJJU1CT8dUxT54agt8BemAKgiuzRyRCdtIQNSSQ1yNHIAfZAitkMaA_psmPxidRyGpTPmNpUhr4PbBV_MtatwoHvwmARgy0IvWL4JGIDbkmov92ZQfYjmelXw0oCPF02PPcaxTqgPaViK1FdRdrliT73MgnR7ap-UVH7--_hz3cnUCOKGGjwtFz3hqueAgtA00Qyq4H4R6TNxoaMAgnn7GnidbSLBAIrLxRRyNMkdr82HMDD8mMHe6dEi5PDpV4GvOrzWB3zQkgJNpIgQo6pivmhBditsy9Kf0B2WR6yLPTbGzocQ3)
---
Peter,

In a speech on voting rights this afternoon, **President Joe Biden said that Republican state legislators are trying to pass 21st century Jim Crow laws.**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: We must DEFEAT Nancy Pelosi!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/1af0d664f3b335a8c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, As a fellow Republican fighting the radical left in Congress, I am proud to serve alongside Congressman Bruce Westerman in the fight to save America. We have a lot of uphill battles to fight, especially with Nancy Pelosi in control of the House. It is CRITICAL that we FLIP THE HOUSE in 2022, and bring some common sense and sanity back to DC! That’s why Bruce and I are working together to make sure we elect a new conservative majority in the midterm elections. Now we need your help more than ever, Peter. **Please chip in what you can right now to help us sustain our fight to flip the House, and finally kick Nancy Pelosi OUT of the Speaker’s Office once and for all!** [**CHIP IN NOW TO FLIP THE HOUSE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/a8d9e1b4af8f8089c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Bruce and I are united on conservative principles like lower taxes, limited government, and strong family values. We also recognize the urgency and importance of stopping the Democrats’ election overhaul bill from passing into law! _There is currently legislation in DC that would completely federalize elections, banish all voter ID laws across the nation, and even automatically register convicted felons and illegal immigrants to vote._ [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/2605407a79ca0029c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/88d4171895f6d9c5c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $15 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/a7f823ddee97701cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/5f59665bdd608139c3d6b838967d376c/34143) I know I don’t need to remind you of how disastrous the situation at the border is right now under Joe Biden’s “leadership.” He halted construction of the wall, laid out an amnesty plan, and stopped punishing the criminals sneaking over the border — what did the Democrats _think_ would happen? **Bruce and I are fighting hard for America every day in Congress, and we need your help to win back our majority and STOP the Democrats from destroying our way of life.** **[Please help by sending a donation of $5, $10, $15, $25, or whatever you can right now. >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/42ee78756133f201c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Thank you for your support, \- Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/2754fcefc0209641c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/77d23c984f6f83f1/37215d7210152fbfc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

clean_body: Peter, As a fellow Republican fighting the radical left in Congress, I am proud to serve alongside Congressman Bruce Westerman in the fight to save America. We have a lot of uphill battles to fight, especially with Nancy Pelosi in control of the House. It is CRITICAL that we FLIP THE HOUSE in 2022, and bring some common sense and sanity back to DC! That’s why Bruce and I are working together to make sure we elect a new conservative majority in the midterm elections. Now we need your help more than ever, Peter. Please chip in what you can right now to help us sustain our fight to flip the House, and finally kick Nancy Pelosi OUT of the Speaker’s Office once and for all! Bruce and I are united on conservative principles like lower taxes, limited government, and strong family values. We also recognize the urgency and importance of stopping the Democrats’ election overhaul bill from passing into law! There is currently legislation in DC that would completely federalize elections, banish all voter ID laws across the nation, and even automatically register convicted felons and illegal immigrants to vote. I know I don’t need to remind you of how disastrous the situation at the border is right now under Joe Biden’s “leadership.” He halted construction of the wall, laid out an amnesty plan, and stopped punishing the criminals sneaking over the border — what did the Democrats think would happen? Bruce and I are fighting hard for America every day in Congress, and we need your help to win back our majority and STOP the Democrats from destroying our way of life. Thank you for your support, \- Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- id:2021-07-06-18:46:46:451t Paid For By Hern For Congress

subject: re: Our Friday deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/532166fc-91e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/552166fc-91e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTIxNjZmYy05MWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24tk1XOJrTlX6OCi5WHK_oSEdVD7d-hh6hSg5DQdrwE=&id=117942571) During this unprecedented and challenging time, please only donate to our campaign if you can afford to do so.
---
---
| | No matter how much Ron Johnson spreads dangerous conspiracy theories, denies climate change, or attacks our democracy, the big corporate donors funding his campaign continue to invest. And as the son-in-law of a billionaire who spent $8 million of his own money to win this Senate seat, we know he will do whatever it takes to stay in power.

They are betting that their money will blind the people of Wisconsin into voting against our values and distract from the fact that Tom Nelson is supporting policies that will help working families — like Medicare for All and getting big money out of politics.

We can’t beat Ron Johnson by running self-funding candidates who won’t stand with Senator Tammy Baldwin in supporting Medicare for All, and won’t support progresssive values like challenging corporate power and the influence of Wall Street. We need the real deal, and that’s Tom Nelson.

[If you want to support a grassroots campaign that will deliver Wisconsin from Ron Johnson, then chip in now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32444542/295797361/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210715_1_2&refcode2=552166fc-91e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTIxNjZmYy05MWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24tk1XOJrTlX6OCi5WHK_oSEdVD7d-hh6hSg5DQdrwE=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

* * *
**_— Begin Forwarded Message —_**

At this point, we know the type of Senator that Ron Johnson is — a fraud comfortable with spreading deadly lies and openly attacking American democracy.

But today, I’m writing this email to let you know what I stand for. I’m running because the next U.S. Senator from Wisconsin should:
* Support workers rights and unions (I even wrote a book this year about how I helped the local union save a paper mill in my home state)
* Champion Medicare For All & the Green New Deal
* End the filibuster to get progressive policies passed
* Fight to break up Wall Street firms that prey on workers and rig the tax code
* Get corporate money out of our politics
* Break up corporate monopolies to give our small businesses and family farmers a fair shot to compete
* Defend women’s rights
* Stand up for the LGBTQ community
* Tax the rich to make them pay their fair share. _The Jeff Bezoses of the world have enough megayachts and personal rocket ships._

**These issues are what I care deeply about, and I will do everything in my power to fight on behalf of working folks like you in the Senate._But we’re in this together._ Your support _right here, right now,_ could help ensure we defeat Ron Johnson in 2022.**

[As one of the only non-millionaires in this race, I’m asking for your support. In these summer months, we need to keep up with our millionaire opponents, including Ron Johnson, who married into a billionaire family. To do that, we need to raise $8,000 by Friday at midnight. The people of Wisconsin deserve better. If you’re ready for a Senator who will serve _everyone_ , chip in to my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32444555/295797455/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210715_1_2&refcode2=552166fc-91e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTIxNjZmYy05MWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24tk1XOJrTlX6OCi5WHK_oSEdVD7d-hh6hSg5DQdrwE=) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Getting stuff done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

When I decided to run for office my goal wasn't to push partisan politics, score cheap political points, or be a fixture on cable news. Simply put, I wanted to get stuff done for hardworking families.

Growing up in the Olympic Peninsula, I had seen firsthand how economic struggles hurt working families and our communities. I wanted to make a positive difference in communities like mine, and I knew public service was a good way to do it.

In the time I've spent in elected office, I've worked hard to never lose sight of that motivation to create meaningful change. It's what has kept me going even in the middle of extreme gridlock.

Each time we've dealt with challenges (from an administration attacking our values for four years to a global pandemic), I've focused on going to work to find a solution. My team and I have tried to live up to the motto - Don't agonize - organize. In fact, that's what I'm doing right now as Chairman of the Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress: reforming Congress so we can deliver more results to the American people.

But I've never done any of this work alone, Peter. The truth is, I never would have been elected in the first place if it weren't for you and other grassroots supporters like you.

**Let me be clear: all the progress we 've helped deliver has been thanks to YOU.**

Now, I'm turning to you once again to ask for your help. In order for me to stay focused on the work that lies ahead, I need to make sure that we're raising the resources we need to hold this seat next year.

**[So, I have to ask, Peter: can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can, before our mid-month deadline tonight at midnight? In order to keep getting stuff done, we need to hit each goal we set. Please, chip in now to help us reach our mid-month goal»](https://act.myngp.com/el/PD9eW8pYvECSUWWkyJuFrRkAs8HAl9qnqb0F9Hn1v1M=/W23ttsG0cBo_FpnPkxNOM1bTjYLDqagxheEe-JtDrX0=?gpsid=50_115_19755&refcode=em21_210715_MM_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210715_MM_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you ahead of time. As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/PD9eW8pYvECSUWWkyJuFrRkAs8HAl9qnqb0F9Hn1v1M=/W23ttsG0cBo_FpnPkxNOM1bTjYLDqagxheEe-JtDrX0=?gpsid=50_115_19755&refcode=em21_210715_MM_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210715_MM_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
News breaking constantly now |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5ca298d624&e=44b8c466b0)

| | Dear ,
**_IMPORTANT ELECTION AUDIT UPDATE_**
Did you see me on Victory News, Kenneth Copeland’s faith-based news program?

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative for the State of Arizona and the leading Conservative candidate to take over Corrupt Secretary of State Hobbs job in Arizona in 2022!

**I have been a pioneer and leader in the vast grassroots movement that is election integrity. In fact, I have been called the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.**

Right now, the water is on the stove and it is simmering, and millions of patriots around the country are just waiting for it to boil.

_Yes, I am talking about the results of America’s Audit in Maricopa County, Arizona._

**In fact, this is why I was invited on to Kenneth Copeland’s faith based news network. To talk about the election integrity movements spreading like wildfire around the country. **

** _And why me? Because since I first put my boots on the ground and got the Maricopa County Audit running, I have been recognized as the chief authority on the Election Integrity movement around the nation._**

And this is why I am writing to you today...

_To give you an inside look as to what to expect to unfold in the coming months, all you have to do is keep reading below._

And what I need you to understand is this: Right now we are at a **critical** moment in the history of this country. Not only with the election audit, but with the countless elections around the country to install secretary of state’s that will serve the people, not the corrupt swamp – and will defend the integrity of our elections!

**And if we do not win this VERY important race in 2022, our elections will be left at the mercy of the Democrats, and if there is anything that I learned from 2020 – the Democrats will stop at literally nothing to win.**

[This is why I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=837daaf5ef&e=44b8c466b0). Every dollar raised today will go to getting the message of election integrity out around the country so that we can win the election for Secretary of State and save our elections!

[_Please donate as much as you can to fight against the Radical Left who are stealing our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ef51ac1cce&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4d16dd4edb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***SPREAD THE AUDIT***
As we speak, we have boots on the ground pushing to spread the Election Audit around the country.

**I already have travel planned to Washington in October, where we are pressing for a public hearing on election integrity.**

_We are also pressing in crucial swing state Pennsylvania to bring the truth to light!_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=987f2eff2e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And if there’s one thing I know about Senator Mastriano, he will be like a pit bull on a porkchop with the election audit.

_We WILL get to the bottom of this._
---
|
---
| Can you see it? Do you see what is happening?

**The Election Integrity mission is spreading around the country like wildfire.**

**_[Will you join us on our mission?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a93483065&e=44b8c466b0)_**

_[Donate $100, $250, $500 or more today to protect American Democracy and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5970dc6add&e=44b8c466b0)_
***JOIN THE MISSION***
**I am going to bottom-line this for you.**

**_We are finishing the most thorough election audit in history. Double-checking, Triple-checking... as many times as it takes to prove without a doubt what we knew all along. The 2020 election was stolen._**

We know that enemies will emerge out of the woodwork when the results are tabulated and released.

They already are. I and countless Election Integrity patriots like myself have been attacked, ridiculed, and challenged in every way imaginable.

**Imagine the onslaught when we catch them red-handed.**

[And this is why I need your support today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4229ed8481&e=44b8c466b0) We are in an all-out brawl with those who would have us believe that America is evil, and that elections are meant to be stolen. [Without your support, we simply can’t win.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=253ac03679&e=44b8c466b0)

**And at the end of the day, I have a few very strong convictions I want to share with you before I say goodbye until next time:**
* **If the Democrats were so darn sure that this election was the “safest and most secure ever,” then they would embrace the opportunity to assist in the audit, not challenge it at every turn.**
* **Any institution that receives public funding, schools, the police, even banks, are routinely audited by regulators – with the exception of elections. What makes elections different?**

Here’s the deal folks, this tells me without a shadow of a doubt that Corrupt Katie Hobbs and her Democrat cronies got something to hide and something up their sleeve.

**And we better be prepared. We know the Democrats wills top at nothing.**

And when that time comes, will you be in our corner?

_[Donate TODAY to join the movement and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=92b271c15e&e=44b8c466b0)_

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? Fellow American,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=64d9b27417af4f5fabacdb11de43fbd2&_e=gMmQblfZ0tyAVQmj0bAImgoEOg385zYqE_i1vGAreu_beR2GqGC2PIDdMstelKe08wvhzSCpn0GZOL4Xh_so42jS-ALmiEGmJ9VDF_OkPEFKAYu4v4heMcRg3XMJly1v6bJr7Gx3PceRO9iM19InRTjGdCjKk6J6s9R4NcVG44pGATo_d0OowGHUHfAfsBx9MtN3_GJexo1LqPxfpjLBvNT__HY0gEyALQbzM6MUKDYPZ20c0gpE64SO7-tk-WcuY2DDa-xg7VEEJLaZxgJ52bvP9IaypA4CruuwmLsK56SupIDryqMezPU6kMBUDoJuktvqCQTKddmA9LGyblZoQTqBcfIrebwyFfmGgiXtpU7Q6vH9F7fzWGioaQ6b-ETcpP45pCNaLG70mLZ0TuJvPH63nCE2VO3uI_2Xn56uKdLCmchDH7-FHMpw7Kvag3JGMrq99_fAYMYR5ETjNjHP5GQqY29DKqC_x84BkvlGl7zyRDm2nZpw0AzHbCM81o-iLLdBM4ttaNOHBB6gJCstQw%3D%3D)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

clean_body: Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. Agree or disagree? . Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist. How absurd. Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students. Please take a moment to let us know: | POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: Tuesday, July 13th Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal? The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ e pluribus unum ” – out of many, one. This is what the Left does, Fellow American, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America. . Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

| | Peter, I've been watching the back and forth about the infrastructure and transportation bills in Congress, and I'm more than a little troubled by lawmakers' focus on electric cars. If we snapped our fingers and replaced every gas-powered car in America with an electric one, we'd have no way to charge them all. The charging infrastructure just isn't there. Even if it was there, we've got to invest in faster charging batteries. If you think sitting in a 10 minute line at a gas station is a hassle, the 30 minute wait to recharge your battery will really put you over the edge. Don't get me wrong: **electric cars and renewable energy sources _are and must be our_ future, but we can't just say that and make it so. ** So let's instead start to talk about the next steps. Let's talk about appealing to American ingenuity. Let's talk about offering a prize to whoever can cut charging times in half. Let's put people to work upgrading the electric grid and making charging stations accessible. Let's save tomorrow by _building a better tomorrow._ **If the United States makes a choice to use its government and capital to invest in renewable infrastructure for a change like this, we can not only fight climate change in a big way, but we can become a global leader in energy tech and production.** Jobs? They'd be there. A healthier planet? That too. **Big Oil and their lackeys in Washington won't like it, but they can go drill themselves.** I am running for the U.S. Senate here in Pennsylvania because our families can't wait for DC politicians to schedule more hearings to decide whether boiling the planet alive is a good idea. Our future is at stake, after all, and it's time for leaders brave enough to see it done. **[Join me, Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32447702/295808041/-34735242?refcode=2021-07-15-infrastructure&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=40174ab0-9ae5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE3NGFiMC05YWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68Qy-cY3VvJZnkuihUuIk3q_uSzaTaRVV5uxrQtrfWU=)****.** clean_body: | | | Peter, I've been watching the back and forth about the infrastructure and transportation bills in Congress, and I'm more than a little troubled by lawmakers' focus on electric cars. If we snapped our fingers and replaced every gas-powered car in America with an electric one, we'd have no way to charge them all. The charging infrastructure just isn't there. Even if it was there, we've got to invest in faster charging batteries. If you think sitting in a 10 minute line at a gas station is a hassle, the 30 minute wait to recharge your battery will really put you over the edge. Don't get me wrong: electric cars and renewable energy sources are and must be our future, but we can't just say that and make it so. So let's instead start to talk about the next steps. Let's talk about appealing to American ingenuity. Let's talk about offering a prize to whoever can cut charging times in half. Let's put people to work upgrading the electric grid and making charging stations accessible. Let's save tomorrow by building a better tomorrow. If the United States makes a choice to use its government and capital to invest in renewable infrastructure for a change like this, we can not only fight climate change in a big way, but we can become a global leader in energy tech and production. Jobs? They'd be there. A healthier planet? That too. Big Oil and their lackeys in Washington won't like it, but they can go drill themselves. I am running for the U.S. Senate here in Pennsylvania because our families can't wait for DC politicians to schedule more hearings to decide whether boiling the planet alive is a good idea. Our future is at stake, after all, and it's time for leaders brave enough to see it done. =. Let's get it done. | | Peter, Just in the last week, our opponent Madison Cawthorn stoked baseless fears about vaccination campaigns, continued to spread Trump’s Big Lie, and tweeted (and then deleted) a picture of a swastika. As deeply disappointing as all of that is, none of it is surprising. Cawthorn can keep making all the negative press he wants -- **we’re going to make history.** [**We’re less than one month out from our big Day of Action, where we’ll launch the largest organizing campaign Western North Carolina’s ever seen. We need to raise $3,000 by this weekend to stay on track for a strong launch to our organizing plan -- can you chip in $25?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32449702/295813843/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210715_FR_MM1Disappointing_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA5N2VlMi05ZWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jojPl9Zy5MHTIzdZL9OqGLkyj7uJC3PDtc10tVZLiiY=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32449704/295813844/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210715_FR_MM1Disappointing_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA5N2VlMi05ZWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jojPl9Zy5MHTIzdZL9OqGLkyj7uJC3PDtc10tVZLiiY=)

Organizing is the heart of this campaign. We’re going to talk with -- and listen to -- voters in every corner of the district._That’s how we win._
And that takes resources. It’s going to take a whole lot of campaign literature, clipboards, phone calls, text messages, and snacks to make sure our volunteers have what they need to flip this district blue.
Folks here in NC-11 are fired up to get out and organize -- and elect a leader who will stand on the side of integrity and results, _not one who is actively working to undermine our democracy._[**Will you chip in to empower our volunteers to get out and organize ahead of our huge Day of Action?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32449706/295813847/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210715_FR_MM1Disappointing_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA5N2VlMi05ZWU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jojPl9Zy5MHTIzdZL9OqGLkyj7uJC3PDtc10tVZLiiY=)

clean_body: Cawthorn can keep making all the negative press he wants -- we’re going to make history. | = | | Peter, Just in the last week, our opponent Madison Cawthorn stoked baseless fears about vaccination campaigns, continued to spread Trump’s Big Lie, and tweeted (and then deleted) a picture of a swastika. As deeply disappointing as all of that is, none of it is surprising. Cawthorn can keep making all the negative press he wants -- we’re going to make history. = | | | = Organizing is the heart of this campaign. We’re going to talk with -- and listen to -- voters in every corner of the district.That’s how we win. And that takes resources. It’s going to take a whole lot of campaign literature, clipboards, phone calls, text messages, and snacks to make sure our volunteers have what they need to flip this district blue. Folks here in NC-11 are fired up to get out and organize -- and elect a leader who will stand on the side of integrity and results, not one who is actively working to undermine our democracy.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFGKn0p4-H3Ea1rzrjwre7bFbMuf11Q3bKLrdoUwaNR9hfnz7TOIUPBhWTcuReTtrlOPnm1PIe28lvMP3WN6cgwjVEO8xdJKjuCItSjUm_P9nc7v28mXI0NG4DT9SCjH5G481fPTQN_cVwRUvpPnzk_L8SrrTNosEDdOteekbMBC03l4cdboFMe3Hi4OCPvDjMu_Dbm4t6XJfB-nzQbyrCBV)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFHFfeUY3dMSLyjx2ANn-2erakjoFO8cAm_gVhdfJojNzY-1uNx2gbdD-Gy5PQHvwQsZiliP9Hmhb5s0gcCwKBvbOlq6Qtb49j4-xVqqy_6-qSGcjp0bCMgDFvWZDxHZ5gIThWaelWQVUqv73UN9J5zd4Y_y8lxIDb7Bw2lXnXUDwpUpMQJx0WDD6SmaaqHD9ToaBYAXlwN08Sd8HxdzN-cS)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFFhqhrJjB4GdR4Y6P33PB0FmaQLdP95DxDPB3FRlk8N8GdC3Rkm_HSrW7WyMZjCAJPws2_E1i0lexsF9TPXGYcvHBNg_pH9DvZAnMLjTYOMT1k85-i4I9St-gSulJOtAc8iUe2zxD3JC5-WQeVar5REU8uIoS_WMOX_CWJ2csOvaKtSeKVVGFOnV3G5yilI-AZh-VHllz9vz5E3egAzlHnP)

I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won’t be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFHKUfkyHcBCRBWW24uu3ASjJwjhQrJuylScHzM-sI3redH26BHysELHKBZf2KrJ0Xj3D72FIdQKLGcdksNivzbQndQKVQgyoob2KZ9FXoS5FfRalHGjpcVY1h0zxw4UpUUcu5i2rwoL38IrNc2EPBL0bJQI3waU7wnTfUlrGdbKTPwHpTBshPeBkyNkfSu0IuZwVbXyoXmiPG1F_7F6E1WH)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before July 31st, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFHot2yRQ4_fE6KJe192yJC5cCSDMJ1SlJ2FL9nAFd29TcE69JxyufLjXUFrIEeEMbA-qcey6TWufQOPXFSEdq8XzOUg5qZLfvvl1dnuynMQWY7Xw5IWgwWkV2L2rHtFeNlpOc8Ml2LoLZV-1Fc6pzAfyCDeNHK40tsEVXrmYXEGQpSDC6b1_dv92mWFgGrju_AGiGLatMaiHj_LEJiDpW0q)**

We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I’m asking you to give generously](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57d0da69c5dd48a190b2add4543e752d&_e=llC8Q20GJ08j_4ce7ZUPxcqKjP_vBbcabg5Xy5bDEbuEb0foy4xgq-UnbzurPcPQErYuSCqxlT8fKKI36m9RKjg_gfEpkPYCYp_ODzFpQxZKL6AUPDCVbxCyxqzuYpls8cgteAq7zKr4ezyqarIv8I-KV_7OmzDv2k5zYFchZs8uiE6o63j5btVOCqTS_GXwAv1yNLSDktjNtRV2rQ8CF-j-sLG1weNprI3CHQWZVEp7zadPNGBYV42noBg90stJ2bnM6eGwANqQvxcYmyXcKvKmEIYueoHOWos_HsvLPFGpUdujsiqsdwJtdz4icztfjOM0vjRvGFVcWMe90SI9FAWwrbVoTcClOVxauJ4OsZRkq5gEXsxpily0MZIBIWvSxrE4jb_rfh5KtfwK7hhcTkVc35a2FcvVtOoOnx1SkcyQstVrWuPVhei0KBM3bFX_63L6plFnDsyi_tLuLeDlkcX4uNGuhKx05jo6kztRiRFKC0N2Dzc4qvnxp-o3Wp-Z)** – whatever that means to you.
