clean_body: Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before July 31st, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas. We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community. Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED! On behalf of my friend Monica, – whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she’ll make us all proud. - Respectfully, Senator Ted Cruz | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Mitch McConnell is hoping that our fundraising will slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We are halfway through the month and we have some work to do if we want to keep up the pace. As of right now, we need 28,359 more donations in order to hit our 40,000 online donation goal for July.
As we head into the summer, which is usually slower for fundraising, we have to continue growing the support for this campaign.
Mitch McConnell is hoping that our fundraising will slow down. And what we’re worried about is that it actually did at this point last summer, so we really have to make sure we keep up the pace.
Which is why we’re hoping that we can get 1,290 donations today - the number of donations we need every day this month to stay on track and hit our goal. So what do you say, friend?
[**If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and fight for change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210715-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=942_6688874_VAVfjY&akid=942%2E6688874%2EVAVfjY)

name: Majority Maker Alerts via NCGOP
subject: Exclusive Invitation for Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc

This is a time-limited opportunity.

The Majority Makers Membership isn’t for just anyone. clean_body: This is a time-limited opportunity. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Congratulations, Peter! We just had 12 new spots open up in our Exclusive Majority Makers Club , and we thought of you right away. The Majority Makers Membership isn’t for just anyone. Only the most dedicated Grassroots Republicans are offered a coveted spot, and as one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Englewood, FL, we thought you’d be perfect. We’ll hold your slot until then, but after that we may need to make it available to the next supporter. | CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | | | | | | Congrats again, Peter. We can’t wait to have you on board. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
Peter, I'll be honest. I'm concerned about being outraised.
|
---
| | | Peter, I'll be honest. I'm concerned about being outraised.

_Fox News_ just wrote that my race against radical Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings could be the most expensive Senate race ever, and I believe it! We just learned that in only 21 days, Val Demings raised $4.6 MILLION.

21 Days. 21 Days is all it took for her to outraise me for the ENTIRE Quarter. It's more clear than ever Chuck and Nancy are willing to do whatever it takes to replace me with one of their puppets and elect a Trump Impeachment Manager to the US Senate.

In addition to all this, _CNN_ moved my race against Val Demings up on its list of the Top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. The warning signs are popping up left and right, but there's one thing the media doesn't see: **_the conservatives like you who know the stakes and know when it 's time to step up and chip in. _**

Well, Peter, if you were waiting to step up, now's the time. We need you now more than ever. _**[We are asking every patriot who gets this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we've lost to radical Val Demings.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57942822:6QA87flqN:m:1:3253819041:64D2713CBCE7A746DBFD82B2D3D53077:r "We are asking every patriot who gets
this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we’ve lost to radical Val Demings.")**_ **We can 't afford a single person to ignore this email:**

---

---

**I 'm relying on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to carry me across the finish line. **These crazy numbers that Val is putting up just show the IMPORTANCE of each and every patriot stepping up and doing their part. _**[So, I'm pleading with you, don't let us lose -- donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57942823:6QA87flqN:m:1:3253819041:64D2713CBCE7A746DBFD82B2D3D53077:r "So, I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today. ")**_

Thank you for your help,
Marco Rubio

body:
#

Friends —
What if we told you that $10 is what we need to get universal background checks signed into law.
Just $10
Well, that’s the truth. Because most of our support comes from people reading emails like this and pitching in because they believe in the work we are doing to save lives. Which is why we need to ask:
We’re so grateful to have you with us in this fight to pass universal background checks. [**If you could make your first contribution of $10, that would help put us in a great position to urge the Senate to bring universal background checks to the floor for a vote.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210715-1-15&t=2&refcode2=341_3935704_Y9rVzO&akid=341%2E3935704%2EY9rVzO)

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: urgent request for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
I'm reaching out as the DCCC Chair with an urgent request.

**[House Democrats are just 14 hours away from our Mid Month Deadline, and we’re still short of our must-hit goal. Republicans are on a staggering fundraising streak, so we can’t afford to falter now. Can I count on you and your $3 before my 14-hour deadline?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0-_)**

There's no doubt about it: **We 're in for a tough fight to defend our House Majority.**

Just take a look at the facts:

\-- Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** districts to retake power.
\-- They've broken **FOUR **monthly fundraising records in a row.
\-- And they have a staggering **$55 MILLION** war chest at their immediate disposal.

So as the lead Democrat tasked with protecting our House Majority, here's the truth:

**I need a historic surge of support from every last grassroots Democrat across the country to close the gap and protect our Majority. **

That's why I'm asking you personally:

**[Before our Mid Month Deadline hits in just 14 hours, will you rush $3 to close the gap and defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrv~)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFA74-)

Thanks,

Sean Patrick Maloney

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:
It's time to restore freedom.

https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskmandates-what-do-you-think-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july15hf
Unelected bureaucrats don’t make laws. Congress does. And it’s past time for Congress to take action to END mask mandates on public transportation.

That’s what I think at least — and this week I introduced the Travel Mask Mandate Repeal Act of 2021 with Senator Rand Paul.

Our plan would put a permanent end to mask mandate requirements on everything from planes to trains and buses. Do you support this? Let me know here. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskmandates-what-do-you-think-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july15hf)

Communities and states have reopened. Our nation has regained a sense of normalcy.

It’s past time for Washington to recognize that. We need to IMMEDIATELY restore Americans’ freedoms and end these unnecessary rules.

name: Christy Smith
subject: Parents are receiving new stimulus!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454610/295819534/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=&emci=0634a869-a3e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a62fd70-a4e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

You may have seen my team's email about the _child tax credit payments_ that will be sent to millions of parents across the country starting this week.

I want to reiterate the importance of this direct stimulus -- payments like this could cut child poverty in half, helping millions of hard working families provide their children with food, clothes, books, and so much more.

But even with overwhelming evidence that these direct payments will help thousands of families right here in CA-25, Mike Garcia still didn't vote to support it. This should come as no surprise to those of us who know Mike's voting record.

The thing is, this is not out of character for Mike Garcia. Time and time again, he has voted against policies that benefit the people in this district and instead sided with folks like Marjorie Taylor Greene.

**Look, Peter, if I can promise you one thing, I promise you that when I get to Congress I will fight like hell to work for the people of this district. I will work for you, not for partisan special interests.[ But I can’t be that leader for CA-25 without your help. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454611/295819535/453008394?refcode=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=)**

Thank you for standing up for this district.

\-- Christy Smith

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: Team Christy
Date: Mon, July 12, 2021
Subject: **Information regarding the Child Tax Credit**

Peter,

This pandemic has presented so many different challenges for parents. Whether it was adjusting to a remote working environment or finding a new job altogether, balancing work and home life was more demanding than ever.

As more schools reopen in the fall and America starts to return to normal, it has never been more clear that parents still need support -- and they need it _fast_.

Though the Child Tax Credit has existed since 1997, it's getting a major boost this year! Starting July 15th, 2021, millions of eligible parents will be receiving a monthly payment for up to $300 per month for each child under age 6 and up to $250 per month for each child ages 6 through 17.

But without further legislation, the Child Tax Credit will stop being an automatic payment to working families and revert back to its original form.

**Help us thank President Biden and Congress for putting money into the pockets of hard working California families and call on Congress to make it permanent.[Sign the petition now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454612/295819536/-655475997?ms=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&refcode=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=&emci=0634a869-a3e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a62fd70-a4e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

And while the Child Tax Credit has been wildly popular for Americans across the country, Mike Garcia is unsurprisingly opposed to this policy which cuts childhood poverty in half.

Mike Garcia has a long history of bad votes on the House floor, but voting against the American Rescue Plan -- which included monthly payments for the Child Tax Credit -- takes the cake. **If he can't vote in favor of our working families here in California (along with money for vaccines), he has got to go.**

President Biden worked hard to make sure the American Rescue Plan gave every American the support they needed to get through the pandemic, but American families will continue to need our support long after the pandemic is over.

**[It's clear Mike Garcia won't be there for our families or for the Child Tax Credit -- so let's make sure it's loud and clear that _we_ support our families here in CA-25. Sign the petition to keep money in the pockets of those who need it most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454613/295819537/-655475997?ms=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&refcode=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=&emci=0634a869-a3e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a62fd70-a4e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

Thank you for always ensuring your voice is heard!

\-- Team Christy

PS: **[Peter, to see if you qualify, visit the IRS Advanced Child Tax Credit payment page here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454614/295819538/-510701710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=&emci=0634a869-a3e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a62fd70-a4e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32454615/295819539/453008394?refcode=em21_210714_childtaxcreditkicker-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYyZmQ3MC1hNGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV5oVjrVSfdHPx12WX9VqFVZMKJs4ywSS3Q3TJiKYFU=)

clean_body: Earlier this month, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022 | | | Derek — check this out: Earlier this month, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. Guess which state was ranked #1? Pennsylvania. 😱 Take a look for yourself: it or not, Derek, this isn't the first time we've been ranked first in this list. Seriously, there’s already consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022. That’s why it’s absolutely mission-critical that we raise as much money as possible early on to show that John Fetterman is the candidate that can win not just the primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP. ** This is really big news for our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign to lift up all of PA's 67 counties. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing, Derek. Thanks for everything, Team Fetterman P.S. The #1 Most Likely to Flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support. ** | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . Melinda, her husband and four kids were living in a tent for two months after losing their home in a fire. Their credit card debt had racked up and they were never going to get out from under it. **But thanks to the stimulus checks and now the expanded Child Tax Credit, Melinda and her kids are able to start a whole new life.**
_This is why I ran for Congress in the first place. To actually help people!_
But this can only be the beginning. After a year of almost unimaginable challenges, there is so much work ahead of us and we can't afford to go back. We have to keep pushing forward.
[**That 's why I'm asking: will you please chip in $15 so we can keep the most competitive district in California blue and keep the progress going?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/-X9jHNKMbw0giBq-bu7yiSQm9gLtWk9BnaEAE9FEweU=?refcode=E10203-20210715-ChildTaxCredit-SL-Economy-RegTemplate-COVID-NA&amount=15)
Thanks,
Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/xQjmeApWxzyIXnbtnvBatUdNCg2Wl0uMHLK7i9xIG9E=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/ofMAWzpDLra-xK3_w33eNcfUZ6rqKZQHDsZihviCKCM=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/Lpy6c7GMzKYgqs_Q4RKt47H3gVp1iTNvNhRMTrp6hys=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/fiyXsgKOS_gszVh4Lbsmqy6SGydPnyjgivdO-8kg6rE=) here.

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/-X9jHNKMbw0giBq-bu7yiSQm9gLtWk9BnaEAE9FEweU=?refcode=E10159-20210713-TrumpSpeaker-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/boaTujnoXKAdDT5no9MoHJXoxIqZac9NzaIrbcu9Zdc=/-X9jHNKMbw0giBq-bu7yiSQm9gLtWk9BnaEAE9FEweU=?refcode=E10159-20210713-TrumpSpeaker-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey Peter -- first, some good news:

**Thanks to folks all over Wisconsin pitching in, our campaign has officially received donations from all 72 counties, 93% of our contributions were under $100, and our average grassroots contribution was just $29.**

All without accepting a single corporate PAC contribution! That's remarkable, Peter, and it's what a people-powered campaign is supposed to look like. I couldn't be more grateful.

**More good news:** _CNN_ has called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican senator up in 2022, making it clear that we can flip this seat and expand our Senate majority. And with National Republicans already attacking me personally, the momentum is clearly on our side.

**Now the not-so-great news:** We've got a big fundraising deadline tomorrow. If we want to beat Ron Johnson, our team will need every available resource from supporters like you to help us combat the millions of dollars in attacks that will surely be heading our way in this race.

That's why I'm respectfully asking today:

**Will you use this personal link to add a donation to support our campaign before tomorrow's mid-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important -- you can chip in any amount right here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-july-21&refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32455712/295826544/1714397553?gpsid=50_130_19758&refcode=em21_210715_MM3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210715_MM3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRjZjBmNC1hN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CABTriwUrY2I0ahYjotgPKTkV5GJaCqb3HXVWIp1qsA=)**

Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. I don't have a rolodex full of right-wing megadonors powering this campaign, and I certainly don't have the "full support" of Donald Trump (not that I'd want it).

Instead, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to chip in a few hard-earned dollars at a time to keep our momentum going, which is why I send these requests every so often. They're important to building a campaign that can go the distance and defeat Ron Johnson.

Thank you, as always, for stepping up.

\-- Sarah

| Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32455713/295826545/1714397553?gpsid=50_130_19758&refcode=em21_210715_MM3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_ftr_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210715_MM3_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_ftr_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRjZjBmNC1hN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CABTriwUrY2I0ahYjotgPKTkV5GJaCqb3HXVWIp1qsA=)

clean_body: Hey Peter -- first, some good news: Thanks to folks all over Wisconsin pitching in, our campaign has officially received donations from all 72 counties, 93% of our contributions were under $100, and our average grassroots contribution was just $29. All without accepting a single corporate PAC contribution! That's remarkable, Peter, and it's what a people-powered campaign is supposed to look like. I couldn't be more grateful. More good news: CNN has called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican senator up in 2022, making it clear that we can flip this seat and expand our Senate majority. And with National Republicans already attacking me personally, the momentum is clearly on our side. Now the not-so-great news: We've got a big fundraising deadline tomorrow. If we want to beat Ron Johnson, our team will need every available resource from supporters like you to help us combat the millions of dollars in attacks that will surely be heading our way in this race. That's why I'm respectfully asking today: Will you use this personal link to add a donation to support our campaign before tomorrow's mid-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important -- you can chip in any amount right here:= Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. I don't have a rolodex full of right-wing megadonors powering this campaign, and I certainly don't have the "full support" of Donald Trump (not that I'd want it). Instead, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to chip in a few hard-earned dollars at a time to keep our momentum going, which is why I send these requests every so often. They're important to building a campaign that can go the distance and defeat Ron Johnson. Thank you, as always, for stepping up. \-- Sarah | Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | = If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, pleasemailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com. subject: Will Douglas slams Texas Democrats who fled to D.C. on private jet
body:
Today, Will Douglas (R) released the following video slamming Democrat Texas state legislators, including his opponent Rep. Rhetta Bowers (D), who lef | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/private-jet-7-15-2021?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=17dbb02579&e=4f010155df)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
July 15, 2021
---
**CONTACT:[Matt Langston](mailto:Matt@BigDogStrategies.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20\(TX-HD-113\))**
(703) 901-2595
---
| **Will Douglas slams Texas Democrats who fled to D.C. on private jet** **Rowlett, TX** — Today, Will Douglas (R) released the following video slamming Democrat Texas state legislators, including his opponent Rep. Rhetta Bowers (D), who left the state – and a special session of the legislature – on a private jet for Washington DC: [https://youtu.be/5Hkd7eiFEzU](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=969d5374b7&e=4f010155df)
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=615ddbfbc3&e=4f010155df)
---
_TRANSCRIPT:_

Like millions of my fellow Texans, I'm at work today.

The same can't be said for my State Rep, Rhetta Bowers, along with the dozens of other Democrat legislators

who packed their private plane with beer and fled to DC this week.

You all had the opportunity to help people: to help property taxpayers, retired teachers,

those overwhelmed by the border crisis, pass election integrity reform, and so much more.

But some of our elected officials have decided their highest priority is not Texans,

but D.C. politicians trying to pass a federal bill.

By the way, James Talarico, did you need to show ID before you boarded that jet?

Democrats need to get back to Texas,

get back to work, and get back to the job you were elected to do.
###
| _Will is a self-made pharmacy owner who grew up in a small town across the Red River. Raised as a hard-working conservative, Will paid his way through the University of Oklahoma College of Pharmacy before moving to Dallas County to begin his career. Through hard work and long hours, Will purchased several small pharmacies and currently manages his own business, Crimson Care Pharmacy Group. He is running for Texas State House District 113 in the 2022 election._
###
---

You all had the opportunity to help people: to help property taxpayers, retired teachers, those overwhelmed by the border crisis, pass election integrity reform, and so much more. But some of our elected officials have decided their highest priority is not Texans, but D.C. politicians trying to pass a federal bill. By the way, James Talarico, did you need to show ID before you boarded that jet? Democrats need to get back to Texas, get back to work, and get back to the job you were elected to do. | Will is a self-made pharmacy owner who grew up in a small town across the Red River. Raised as a hard-working conservative, Will paid his way through the University of Oklahoma College of Pharmacy before moving to Dallas County to begin his career. Through hard work and long hours, Will purchased several small pharmacies and currently manages his own business, Crimson Care Pharmacy Group. He is running for Texas State House District 113 in the 2022 election. | | | | | | | | | | | | "DONATE" | | Copyright © 2021 Will Douglas for Texas, All rights reserved.

name: Karen Bass
subject: Checking in about tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Yesterday, my finance team reached out about our mid-month fundraising goal. Since then, a groundswell of people have donated.

I want to say **thank you** to everyone for your support! But one strong fundraising day wasn't enough to get us to where we need to be.

We're only $1,940 away from our mid-month goal, friend, and the deadline is tomorrow. I'm checking in to see if you can help us close this final gap.

**[If you've been on the fence about donating, now is the time to donate to help me lay the groundwork to protect our Democratic House majority. Chip in $5, $8, or whatever you can to help our team hit our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgfY9Dxw5I8Ew30wksYDxQvlB3B8YeBVgaFQHgsHr4w=/jApqfCdj8-xEQY20KL0KS9zQ03eCt3TgvauS8JsxikU=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210715_mm2_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210715_mm2_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

This fundraising goal isn't about me. It's about our work to pass historic policing reform, tackle the climate crisis, and rebuild our country back better so that it _works_ for working people.

We've already seen proof that our House majority is working with President Joe Biden to pass meaningful legislation. National Republicans know this, and it's why they are spending hand over fist to flip the five seats they need to take back the House.

I'm determined to defend all that we've fought for, not just for our majority, but for America's future. And make no mistake -- what we accomplish these next few days will have a lasting impact on the midterm elections.

**[We set our $5,000 mid-month goal because that's what we have to raise to make sure we are in a good position to defend the House majority. I won't let us fall short, but I am counting on grassroots support. If you're able, friend, please chip in what you can to help us hit our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgfY9Dxw5I8Ew30wksYDxQvlB3B8YeBVgaFQHgsHr4w=/jApqfCdj8-xEQY20KL0KS9zQ03eCt3TgvauS8JsxikU=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210715_mm2_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210715_mm2_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Onward,

Karen

subject: Billionaire Peter Thiel is dumping more money into Senate races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www

body:
For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ed46330c79c94ef98670bdf9d049dfca&_e=1Epy8Q7ttBNcrK55Fa2BtgnR0UTj4I07qnkf6TESwBhxh0Y6bf6AM2SG_yLvzrPrRpWkZfRQRL4ucbLiX56MqnjHZMDihIhrDZuRETH1h9zd6FMKGuNuN4x82QT-V62Pmkoe9cucY9ANamGBp2eH08MooUyMZ1fVsqlPNOPmXn-Oz_VVGbI5CVa_9IFkOAVyb65tGHMKCsTkgkDzu8_SIJLNgemysQfddjngz79xX2gjTFtVnqjHxXdiEokGlZ-QV8eFVsm7ex2AfE80TuD31IJUYMtdfkbN1ujeEHdhSw_LlFuDtBgRetyrtaqX48ah2QG-LqwV_TqQ3YyXaGNp7m1a2AmZwd0rrR5zPgFTKdnZH-sa-9A7BChAVUff6v6f399e4KTAZHMDQI2gJRt3hBjvnINo4eOxm1e_I8SRZ2TV3N7CZId2xPE40DHyu2CxkCNYCs3z_OyX9niNDj33rrMZ93iW_W71-SxNti7N8zNdEsGvFlKAAxpy4hq1DB4z)

Fellow Conservative,

I just introduced a new bill in the U.S. Senate to address one of the most pressing and dangerous situations we face in America today - **the highly partisan actions of “Big Tech” to censor conservatives on social media platforms.**

With President Donald Trump’s recently filed lawsuit against the Big Tech giants Facebook, Google, and Twitter for outright banning him from social media alongside the millions of Americans who are “shadow banned,” this disturbing discrimination and rampant censorship is once again in the news, _but it’s certainly nothing new._

We know the truth. For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices in a thinly veiled effort to help their left-wing globalist allies in the Democrat Party, and this grave injustice needs to end and **it needs to end NOW!**

That’s why I’m introducing the **“Preserving Political Speech Online Act”** in the U.S. Senate to finally crack down and end the Big Tech oligarchs ability to discriminate based on a user’s political beliefs and speech.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you join me and show how much grassroots support there is behind this fair and commonsense legislation to end Big Tech censorship and discrimination by adding your name to my “First Amendment Fairness!” Petition today?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ed46330c79c94ef98670bdf9d049dfca&_e=1Epy8Q7ttBNcrK55Fa2BtgnR0UTj4I07qnkf6TESwBhxh0Y6bf6AM2SG_yLvzrPrRpWkZfRQRL4ucbLiX56MqnjHZMDihIhrDZuRETH1h9zd6FMKGuNuN4x82QT-V62Pmkoe9cucY9ANamGBp2eH08MooUyMZ1fVsqlPNOPmXn-Oz_VVGbI5CVa_9IFkOAVyb65tGHMKCsTkgkDzu8_SIJLNgemysQfddjngz79xX2gjTFtVnqjHxXdiEokGlZ-QV8eFVsm7ex2AfE80TuD31IJUYMtdfkbN1ujeEHdhSw-T56FJ5sIMTm0d1IM_gD6OOGs9dWiv1TZFPraONL6quMfQkqo0PQbTPvZbaXx1D8knMXVU6_YWPHi5zN1wZR8n0t4F4iEu5jWbdAiqFcoG3O3EsOs54nqv9VvEz3rSDi3V13h8Ic96-wD31IYxjhmdH4e9MlLP_buGdOXR_D8NCXy98lxZPmOQHjDWKzRvgvEy_-4Hvu6h_n3Ejwk1nZ4o)**

**[It’s time to demand the end of Big Tech’s arrogant self-appointed determination of who gets to use social media and who does not, Fellow Conservative, so please sign my Petition now and help me hold them accountable!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ed46330c79c94ef98670bdf9d049dfca&_e=1Epy8Q7ttBNcrK55Fa2BtgnR0UTj4I07qnkf6TESwBhxh0Y6bf6AM2SG_yLvzrPrRpWkZfRQRL4ucbLiX56MqnjHZMDihIhrDZuRETH1h9zd6FMKGuNuN4x82QT-V62Pmkoe9cucY9ANamGBp2eH08MooUyMZ1fVsqlPNOPmXn-Oz_VVGbI5CVa_9IFkOAVyb65tGHMKCsTkgkDzu8_SIJLNgemysQfddjngz79xX2gjTFtVnqjHxXdiEokGlZ-QV8eFVsm7ex2AfE80TuD31IJUYMtdfkbN1ujeEHdhSw8iBh6kKgx7uDpst9ImZlEfrXnn3UlkmZETfHNaSO_zL7Q5kCTaLHHNxKplWZGU8RKGKbX6wxrVyAT7l1NnqW2_IcT83a1UsrYYlppD5j0qwH1RUUIoIEYn_jxMeMth-RBkelW46OD0KNwNP3_W2sCJrR2V4CPmSuDG0MU5hzcI1qepnosBZ_7YiYhkydkAeH6WjfKhaNjlcBIyMC9fwxdS)**

**[Thank you, Fellow Conservative- we must all stand together to ensure the leftist bias of Big Tech is brought to an end - please sign the Petition immediately!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ed46330c79c94ef98670bdf9d049dfca&_e=1Epy8Q7ttBNcrK55Fa2BtgnR0UTj4I07qnkf6TESwBhxh0Y6bf6AM2SG_yLvzrPrRpWkZfRQRL4ucbLiX56MqnjHZMDihIhrDZuRETH1h9zd6FMKGuNuN4x82QT-V62Pmkoe9cucY9ANamGBp2eH08MooUyMZ1fVsqlPNOPmXn-Oz_VVGbI5CVa_9IFkOAVyb65tGHMKCsTkgkDzu8_SIJLNgemysQfddjngz79xX2gjTFtVnqjHxXdiEokGlZ-QV8eFVsm7ex2AfE80TuD31IJUYMtdfkbN1ujeEHdhSw8kLz-x1lC_NmLDUY-_7sz1OnsujQXsaYhJD53CNXtPSBoZn9bdF5-rErAC5Q-Z4lf8rFWpP1R_ytocFY-IwI5qgTSApJVyA0JR4qaPpjY2E39gNd7Q4zLTFdXf5AI4UtX-jtw50Z4qhV0hkvoeGVW34uWREng-eeM9Osv5k28qOGwMlN_msIJ3qBRK2m8IWAfY1qtCqmAhSDcfTQ_H5T_N)**

Thank you,

Senator Steve Daines

|
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ed46330c79c94ef98670bdf9d049dfca&_e=1Epy8Q7ttBNcrK55Fa2BtgnR0UTj4I07qnkf6TESwBhxh0Y6bf6AM2SG_yLvzrPrRpWkZfRQRL4ucbLiX56MqnjHZMDihIhrDZuRETH1h9zd6FMKGuNuN4x82QT-V62Pmkoe9cucY9ANamGBp2eH08MooUyMZ1fVsqlPNOPmXn-Oz_VVGbI5CVa_9IFkOAVyb65tGHMKCsTkgkDzu8_SIJLNgemysQfddjngz79xX2gjTFtVnqjHxXdiEokGlZ-QV8eFVsm7ex2AfE80TuD31IJUYMtdfkbN1ujeEHdhSw_DF0mRa9CUZYYskcR8uUvaqzZkrisgUkUXX4zsKM68QMHxIm8GH_h2V8bdj3K6fEKkxhHv1AmT1VjXhfwfozM0R6-gyXTvoMpO_O-oZfyidhW_vZIi7EhMfr8R5hmaEoehsK24yRKgv2fb0BXGodF5u1pUR2wi7gFpos1jao8iqlv2tLCO_zQV9Smxm5uN8rJ3iqchnMm3rWrFmpeCvoNp)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: The 15:17 to Paris
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I was on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=04300b1b3ef04829ae0984c28747e600&_e=8jz2NZIy3g1gELvXCbmyu-gHvtdSO8n2SqLmEtVw8PMOOZM7-5gINYC2AHsa0vZdRS0wNCeA81idk8ur8mFUDRWK73MMg7PvIo67n7Z-DgNtaXKoWoh0eRuzB8rmCxRrn1lw7DAdzeDqbfrN1aj7MSA3ojmveBkgq-gFO6b0cEUoM4Ir2ptXOa9A0W2FFq4PinUDMKcSUngOzp9vGLs0uEEt3O4YlDFYjLfNEU7PQqcbafXAZe9Nm9pw3gYNuuZq_UZl6CyCwnFKM7WiDJ1rsFanvo89X38wBMyVzINDPVwztXrfb-zi1uVIEAeAm3MbdItlMKc92SoN3u5VnhGXsxj6bM0q45AIy52upjbhynPQ5cyCbXjDHA_1PUzDbWuSuxqn3hB8EXgbg2c2lSaoWsMZdRJXMoP3xqJl1NdE0C2adpyAmMwO0TMOPABPCpOLR6nBqS9KKFwTbfp9oBXBJa9TGl_I7HLmDvo_6hUXPnM%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation.

This is my story.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. **My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and **[I need your help to fill our campaign accounts which we were forced to empty entirely last fall](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=04300b1b3ef04829ae0984c28747e600&_e=8jz2NZIy3g1gELvXCbmyu-gHvtdSO8n2SqLmEtVw8PMOOZM7-5gINYC2AHsa0vZdRS0wNCeA81idk8ur8mFUDRWK73MMg7PvIo67n7Z-DgNtaXKoWoh0eRuzB8rmCxRrn1lw7DAdzeDqbfrN1aj7MSA3ojmveBkgq-gFO6b0cEUoM4Ir2ptXOa9A0W2FFq4PinUDMKcSUngOzp9vGLs0uEEt3O4YlDFYjLfNEU7PQqcbafXAZe9Nm9pw3gYNuuZq_UZl6CyCwnFKM7WiDJ1rsLX5R_tzQgtmirIpgrHVXju3p3b37jAt5BsvXZxh9pMp92vYh6kllyASchjPvUEQQPj2e72AeM5Gou2ZjQNoE03skblbXZ7jEU6GGoG9iecu3-mEszL80VAb_fnMVbFADztgXyA4bPmiQJp7RkXvgCYOVYSJtRLT0t85eAtbsv61Brb1LrLI_-L5dP039-nHinWJ-stXt-Mhm3QFyzyBcL8%3D)**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=04300b1b3ef04829ae0984c28747e600&_e=8jz2NZIy3g1gELvXCbmyu-gHvtdSO8n2SqLmEtVw8PMOOZM7-5gINYC2AHsa0vZdRS0wNCeA81idk8ur8mFUDRWK73MMg7PvIo67n7Z-DgNtaXKoWoh0eRuzB8rmCxRrn1lw7DAdzeDqbfrN1aj7MSA3ojmveBkgq-gFO6b0cEUoM4Ir2ptXOa9A0W2FFq4PinUDMKcSUngOzp9vGLs0uEEt3O4YlDFYjLfNEU7PQqcbafXAZe9Nm9pw3gYNuuZq_UZl6CyCwnFKM7WiDJ1rsC8IRqRH4iX3csP0PEYjHp6KXI-XwxxU6n9joNYv-Wq_YEWLXGDLjP5ifAfSHXx9vOuNypw_yHpOYiydgi78EOJDEvFGiC5Yb9rA27g9AC1s6j8JVUAEAKUCd3oH87s11vce_JcPOwKbtjHQC1Ze1V5biVRKIiAiEFBZVB0SZrvuC9Ve2iakfPoh4JtHnhWToJ2OzNjWpKZu3VymvrXKxt0%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

clean_body: I was on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation. This is my story. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day. Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need. Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and . | Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of six seats - Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $100 today to help me get my congressional campaign off the ground? Right now I have $1,000 in our account, and that isn't going to get me anywhere. Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film The 15:17 to Paris, directed by Clint Eastwood. Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California. But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – I did it out of duty. And now, duty is calling me again. I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington. My Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio has prioritized his Washington “values” and radical-socialist colleagues over the constituents of my Oregon community for too long. DeFazio has received an “F” rating from the National Rifle Association and he vehemently supports the outrageous Green New Deal. His stance on these two issues alone do not align with our district or with our country. I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of my opponent and his radical-Left allies. I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear. The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them. My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Fellow American - Can you believe this?

New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops.

I hope this threat is all bluster from left-wing New York politicians, but I'm afraid it's not.

If government limits a commercial business because the business exercises its First Amendment rights, it would set a horrible precedent. **It would also be ferociously opposed by many Members of Congress,_including me._**

When federal funds are shared with states, it never enters my mind to look at the politics of the state on hot-button social issues to determine whether they should be eligible to receive funding. Such a move by New York against Chick-fil-A would create unnecessary upheaval at a time when the country needs to move forward in respecting sincerely held differences of opinion.

The actions by the Left in New York make one thing clear: **"cancel culture" has run amok in America, and it is more important than ever to have elected officials who will stand up to these ridiculous ploys by the Radical Left.**

**That's why we need to reclaim the majority in the United States Senate.**

From rising inflation to chaos at the southern border, it's clear that the Democrats' control in Washington is dangerous to the future of our nation. We must do whatever we can to restore the conservative reforms of the last 4 years, **[but I need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b85ea544181e4b97a86f98ccdd4cc044&_e=g35kinusXftZJZDYz57H4cwICLXX_kUqc8y8luMPwT8yg9IlVg1nCVZxRbGkzZcNLZLWuv7poYwMPAydN4YE8_8KQFTixv2WGcR_Wf2uG_9BlBk6czKImPfQE92kPsnqfXR4OMnZxEXpvu5qY1w7CXEasW0znegUYgpMhnr4CmkTNVWBqN8in0p6bTahGy9dZISVCXJwLxfoo7ycruhB_vHsMdgLurns8mOR4ZWhLj0fMTQynzHOpXUJQHv47EUfP_mzsV4SdOWusRficQZRW4P_jG7uR-mIoWOQmtIdJLtyq8bFCI5pzAFKCQiOtn0PwTsEyUp4vrLMNeYZ85o9MOe7BxPOC7xjX9ui9E9NK68wAU3McROu4TfYCE9v732DOKksYKOCEx6REpEm6CFbKq_k7mmoEg3GAzAW5MnvD7_vIPaNZ6TC2YntfGIUsRB4t7aStBGelIDvjjyFiyEoqz5jmUqq3DY23_hT_-c18vk%3D)**

Chick-fil-A is a lawful business with a great product. I love their food, their service, and their people. No private company, including Chick-fil-A, should be punished for their beliefs.

**[Will you join me in standing up to the Radical Left and "cancel culture"? Will you donate $5 or $10 to help us beat some of these liberals next year and Restore the Majority in the Senate?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b85ea544181e4b97a86f98ccdd4cc044&_e=g35kinusXftZJZDYz57H4cwICLXX_kUqc8y8luMPwT8yg9IlVg1nCVZxRbGkzZcNLZLWuv7poYwMPAydN4YE8_8KQFTixv2WGcR_Wf2uG_9BlBk6czKImPfQE92kPsnqfXR4OMnZxEXpvu5qY1w7CXEasW0znegUYgpMhnr4CmkTNVWBqN8in0p6bTahGy9dZISVCXJwLxfoo7ycruhB_vHsMdgLurns8mOR4ZWhLj0fMTQynzHOpXUJQHv47EUfP_mzsV4SdOWusRficQZRWxQur37mB-NKJy3wnaAtjzSElaED9aDG89lLUwVz61-_SXS7nfKKU9FoR506aMOSZ4jPDBoH0nrfT8daTfqu9PH3H8meCMtrMtjYeQds0ii89WqXXaSqcPRsIjrBn4PewNh7f--XGTH1RvaIfuUrs8GdTvgHrxKjRd3qxeIXaC2WL5YWzaq2CLz52LA1iq8JXOKuhVCVgHFHZfDPRumd8N4%3D)**

I hope you're with me, Fellow American.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops. | Fellow American - Can you believe this? New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops. I hope this threat is all bluster from left-wing New York politicians, but I'm afraid it's not. If government limits a commercial business because the business exercises its First Amendment rights, it would set a horrible precedent. It would also be ferociously opposed by many Members of Congress,including me. When federal funds are shared with states, it never enters my mind to look at the politics of the state on hot-button social issues to determine whether they should be eligible to receive funding. Such a move by New York against Chick-fil-A would create unnecessary upheaval at a time when the country needs to move forward in respecting sincerely held differences of opinion. The actions by the Left in New York make one thing clear: "cancel culture" has run amok in America, and it is more important than ever to have elected officials who will stand up to these ridiculous ploys by the Radical Left. That's why we need to reclaim the majority in the United States Senate. From rising inflation to chaos at the southern border, it's clear that the Democrats' control in Washington is dangerous to the future of our nation. We must do whatever we can to restore the conservative reforms of the last 4 years, Chick-fil-A is a lawful business with a great product. I love their food, their service, and their people. No private company, including Chick-fil-A, should be punished for their beliefs. I hope you're with me, Fellow American. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. The Left's crusade against Chick-fil-A is just another reason why we need to push back on "cancel culture," beat the liberals at the polls, and reclaim the Senate majority next year. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Connor Boyack
subject: School book: "whiteness" is the devil
body:
It is horrible what some schools are teaching kids in the name of "social justice," Critical Race Theory, and "equity". [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c293%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yAymiQCU7EYrZNZCUPnULg&sysid=1)
Friend, just when you thought it couldn't get any crazier...
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4080%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c3HJkR%2fwM62Htmt3NwAx7A&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
It is horrible what some schools are teaching kids in the name of "social justice," Critical Race Theory, and "equity".

[If you're disgusted by what is being taught at schools, then I hope you can help me immediately. ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4081%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eG4zeokP02jNsbq7MyzdNw&sysid=1)

The image below is from a book being taught to kids as young as kindergarten. I can't believe I have to say this but I must since it's 2021 where we have to state the obvious: All racism is bad. And telling kids to judge other kids based on skin color deserves no place in schools.
---
[ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4082%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sVZkhORqOcdhtdCEXgvYjA&sysid=1)
---
I saw the writing on the wall years ago. That's why I created the Tuttle Twins.

I wanted my children to have stories and books that inspired them to learn about the ideals that made our country great - individual rights, liberty, limited government, personal responsibility, and free markets.

Since creating the Tuttle Twins, we have distributed over 2.5 MILLION copies to schools, libraries, and home-school families.

I am now working on my next big project for the Tuttle Twins. I am creating a complete American History Curriculum. It will counter the dangerous ideas being taught in schools, like the 1619 Project.

It's not only a matter of prohibiting socialist indoctrination from schools, we must actively provide better ideas and resources for teachers. Which is why I am creating the Tuttle Twins history curriculum.

[Can you donate $250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can generously afford towards distributing the Tuttle Twins history curriculum in schools? Click here to donate >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4083%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fU4mEzPil7BP2NSBLSFCjQ&sysid=1)

---
[ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4084%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s43t9s%2fkwIui6H5tgAhrmA&sysid=1)
---
The Tuttle Twins history curriculum focuses on a narrative highlighting the fight for liberty from our founding to the 20th Century to today. And the best part, kids will love it just like they enjoy all our Tuttle Twins content.

I am looking for additional seed funding to launch this BIG project to fight back against the indoctrination in our schools. I hope you can chip in today to help me raise $35,000 online.

I do believe it's not enough to simply ban things like CRT in schools. We have to offer a program that gives teachers and schools alternatives.

Please select an amount below to donate today.
---
| [ **Donate $10 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4095%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYKD25DzyWAZgUD1KIbr8w&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $35 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4096%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a3DFD%2fHb%2b6MKfX1SDkEkAQ&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $50 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4097%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0Rds5TkTqnIq4Gf8tZhZvQ&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $100 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4098%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I2K7wP%2bNt9u6AITcS%2bVunw&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $250 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4099%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YRSmG6H8o9jr73rYeGVOGA&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $500 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4090%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CJnUvNnCk%2ftkrz3IZx%2fpbA&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate $1,000 >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vQ4H4JRTgmS1WP1zOT%2fwAw&sysid=1)
---
| [ **Donate Other >>** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4092%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dpy3OgZGgn7AnphPFdNv7Q&sysid=1)
---
It is my goal to have the Tuttle Twins history being taught as the standard in schools across the country.

With your support, we can achieve it.

Thank you,
---
---
## Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author of the Tuttle Twins

subject: Last Call for the Trump Train

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: then and now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945224:6-uwafltN:m:1:3253819041:BBEE10F849B10C6250500C0DB318315E:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: the stakes of this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court promise | | |
---
Hi there, I didn’t think the stakes in my U.S. Senate re-election race could get any higher, but Mitch McConnell has other ideas. You wouldn’t believe what he plans to do if Republicans take back the Senate majority. He says that he will veto President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. Let me say that again: _If there’s an opening on the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has promised to stop President Biden from filling it._ The Senate majority comes down to our race in New Hampshire, and it’s sure to be one of the closest in the country. **[Please rush $5 or more to protect this vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats’ fragile Senate majority before tonight's mid-month deadline. We still have $3,715 left to raise, so this can’t wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32460725/295841814/1018596853?refcode=e20210715_mwh-dm-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI5OGI5Yy1iN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bURBEDUUMu8agXZ-iKi26cl9Gm7b5SWXd-ABNqlyf4=)** McConnell’s tactics could open the door to the Supreme Court stripping Americans of their health care, and it could mean the end of _Roe v. Wade_ and a woman’s right to choose. And a McConnell blockade of the Supreme Court could weaken our democracy and cost citizens their voting rights. **Mitch McConnell knows that beating me in New Hampshire is his best chance at regaining the majority and pulling off his Supreme Court power grab.** **[That’s why I need you to please help me protect the future of the Supreme Court by donating $5 or more today to my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32460726/295841816/1018596853?refcode=e20210715_mwh-dm-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI5OGI5Yy1iN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bURBEDUUMu8agXZ-iKi26cl9Gm7b5SWXd-ABNqlyf4=)** I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done for my campaign so far. But with Mitch McConnell playing politics with the Supreme Court – and with Republicans zeroed in on New Hampshire – I need your continued support to keep building my re-election campaign. It’s no secret that I’m Mitch McConnell’s top Senate target. He’s trying to recruit my opponent. His super PAC allies are attacking me. **Our opponents haven’t forgotten that I won my last race by just 1,017 votes and flipped a red seat blue. They won’t let up until they run me out of the Senate.** If we let them win, Mitch McConnell will be the majority leader. He’ll abuse that power to block President Biden’s nominees to the Supreme Court – just like he did during the Obama administration. We can’t let him get away with it. But to win this race, I need your help now. _The Boston Globe_ called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for re-election.” Senate control – and the future of the Supreme Court – could hinge on what happens in my race. **[That’s why I’m counting on you to please continue your support by donating $5 today -- ahead of tonight's deadline -- to my Senate re-election campaign. Thank you for standing with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32460727/295841818/1018596853?refcode=e20210715_mwh-dm-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI5OGI5Yy1iN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bURBEDUUMu8agXZ-iKi26cl9Gm7b5SWXd-ABNqlyf4=)** With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan P.S. I can’t say it enough. If Republicans defeat me and take back the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell has said he’ll block President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. We must win here in New Hampshire to protect the Court. I can’t do it without your help now. **[Please send your donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32460728/295841820/1018596853?refcode=e20210715_mwh-dm-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI5OGI5Yy1iN2U1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bURBEDUUMu8agXZ-iKi26cl9Gm7b5SWXd-ABNqlyf4=)**

clean_body: Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court promise | | | Hi there, I didn’t think the stakes in my U.S. Senate re-election race could get any higher, but Mitch McConnell has other ideas. You wouldn’t believe what he plans to do if Republicans take back the Senate majority. He says that he will veto President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. Let me say that again: If there’s an opening on the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has promised to stop President Biden from filling it. The Senate majority comes down to our race in New Hampshire, and it’s sure to be one of the closest in the country. = McConnell’s tactics could open the door to the Supreme Court stripping Americans of their health care, and it could mean the end of Roe v. Wade and a woman’s right to choose. And a McConnell blockade of the Supreme Court could weaken our democracy and cost citizens their voting rights. Mitch McConnell knows that beating me in New Hampshire is his best chance at regaining the majority and pulling off his Supreme Court power grab. = I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done for my campaign so far. But with Mitch McConnell playing politics with the Supreme Court – and with Republicans zeroed in on New Hampshire – I need your continued support to keep building my re-election campaign. It’s no secret that I’m Mitch McConnell’s top Senate target. He’s trying to recruit my opponent. His super PAC allies are attacking me. Our opponents haven’t forgotten that I won my last race by just 1,017 votes and flipped a red seat blue. They won’t let up until they run me out of the Senate. If we let them win, Mitch McConnell will be the majority leader. He’ll abuse that power to block President Biden’s nominees to the Supreme Court – just like he did during the Obama administration. We can’t let him get away with it. But to win this race, I need your help now. The Boston Globe called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for re-election.” Senate control – and the future of the Supreme Court – could hinge on what happens in my race. = With every good wish, Senator Maggie Hassan P.S. I can’t say it enough. If Republicans defeat me and take back the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell has said he’ll block President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. We must win here in New Hampshire to protect the Court. I can’t do it without your help now. = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.
Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: Petition: Stand against critical race theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Critical race theory says the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution are racist documents and that the only thing that matters about a perso |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=721c957a6b0743519e6379f7d98f9461&_e=pO8dbRNd0NiRSqpfm4KhjTrowJi4ihF_xWVUwOe9BZW6E1-rKc3BCZUIik-VyiSQqz-tGiB76dVyl4sBHTVFjMkrGLa2gVmGjNV_UVrA4eOUIl_6ajvynLcBaJX4z-mmJ0v_UkeU8ZC2IMJRqtJVCyCHY2PKvQi5KX8tL02oNj2X4tM6gCT8s-elSKPyegUc9yoVBGc_evW3YKj85iU65_VHFTlqthgWQHfTFwL97k1dw3RXjzvAdB602k-4WHCTROZIH9dSCjr9CG2h8qbGnSghop4ty4Bm6BLqY8n4Gtm2fl79Sl1SbQiXmIOYKkfVbkJWNR1jMVu_d7HMq8gELDmGsxVfwLDukVNAE4GX16tAijxdSbcuFPUi781saUnxAwKP7uT6k_wg1WG2YhAP7dZX9jSOg-VLVRK6qB7u2QnCyqi8wVFpoClxMNjuyyE8)
Fellow American,

245 years ago, our Founding Fathers changed the world forever. America is an exceptional nation, and our heritage and Founding Principles should be celebrated.

But today, liberals and the woke mob are on a mission to transform America as we know it. They’re doing everything they can to indoctrinate our kids with critical race theory — **which is anti-American, racist propaganda.**

[**POLL: DO YOU SUPPORT A BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY? »»**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=721c957a6b0743519e6379f7d98f9461&_e=pO8dbRNd0NiRSqpfm4KhjTrowJi4ihF_xWVUwOe9BZW6E1-rKc3BCZUIik-VyiSQqz-tGiB76dVyl4sBHTVFjMkrGLa2gVmGjNV_UVrA4eOUIl_6ajvynLcBaJX4z-mmJ0v_UkeU8ZC2IMJRqtJVCyCHY2PKvQi5KX8tL02oNj2X4tM6gCT8s-elSKPyegUc9yoVBGc_evW3YKj85iU65_VHFTlqthgWQHfTFwL97k0P0SwFiPOoAGB5D1ZdOWViFjO7PkJ7kLbV95yr49gDm4NcE6yKwg1wlMPsKMi_w9SCKb2hiAhPAopm1RmQHqnkUHrns92h8WHbf8ejfNsqsyiz-JB87FEh08doWD4fYr98JdKVFzp4ILH-pgqofqaPcOZ0qHjje69NJQv1mRCqOJblkFZAxG9GO8Slx_YPYlm9MDH86oNcWYNh0kQ_19GG)
_***no response indicates that you support critical race theory being taught in public schools***_

Critical race theory says the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution are racist documents and that the only thing that matters about a person is the color of their skin.

And on July 3rd — the day before Independence Day — the largest teachers’ union in America approved a plan to teach critical race theory in all 50 states and 14,000 school districts.

**[I think this is terrible, and I’m leading the fight to stop this insidious propaganda in the U.S. Senate — but I want to know where YOU stand](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=721c957a6b0743519e6379f7d98f9461&_e=pO8dbRNd0NiRSqpfm4KhjTrowJi4ihF_xWVUwOe9BZW6E1-rKc3BCZUIik-VyiSQqz-tGiB76dVyl4sBHTVFjMkrGLa2gVmGjNV_UVrA4eOUIl_6ajvynLcBaJX4z-mmJ0v_UkeU8ZC2IMJRqtJVCyCHY2PKvQi5KX8tL02oNj2X4tM6gCT8s-elSKPyegUc9yoVBGc_evW3YKj85iU65_VHFTlqthgWQHfTFwL97k0WormpZAJEZOMA0nQ-SKy5JJUGe2ttxtYy4bE2xqwDuyJBy5hL5UcLxvq4CMU6mGEq3P8kHTffvWpypF0w8XMuVotz2J4vvNXckM5OnhBxkQrw0hIf5VHDKBY8ncg7n2hJeP6daO2Q--djVOxG3Et-_YPjI6u9U8IBzEwamwiKa77_haAlANilZuuFC3qziSDciprUQKaQJJ0H3rby07Es)**.

Will you let Republican Senators know here where you stand on critical race theory and if you think it should be banned from the classroom?

Teaching critical race theory would sow division and indoctrinate our kids to hate America. That’s poisonous.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It’s so important that we stop the Left before they start indoctrinating our children.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=721c957a6b0743519e6379f7d98f9461&_e=pO8dbRNd0NiRSqpfm4KhjTrowJi4ihF_xWVUwOe9BZW6E1-rKc3BCZUIik-VyiSQqz-tGiB76dVyl4sBHTVFjMkrGLa2gVmGjNV_UVrA4eOUIl_6ajvynLcBaJX4z-mmJ0v_UkeU8ZC2IMJRqtJVCyCHY2PKvQi5KX8tL02oNj2X4tM6gCT8s-elSKPyegUc9yoVBGc_evW3YKj85iU65_VHFTlqthgWQHfTFwL97k1p6ST6IeIo_e5n8u05lIPcCKTuTY1wE3hDMFjOHfSD7JORMtc0LwpmWbpPTA3AazBBHQNvfDeMjp1xT2Ul2p2NY1CS-t0Vb11D4SDX12ZyvQH-COgD0iU4hceuTzF5uKGlM6_nBsv3BDUM86NYLOe8LL5OlfZ3-1kJslyKw1mIlQzZgbIqJwlYRWlPO_gdsYJ53SEHETeLH96YOm0_5FTO)**

In service,
Sen. Tom Cotton

[**POLL: DO YOU SUPPORT A BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY? »»**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=721c957a6b0743519e6379f7d98f9461&_e=pO8dbRNd0NiRSqpfm4KhjTrowJi4ihF_xWVUwOe9BZW6E1-rKc3BCZUIik-VyiSQqz-tGiB76dVyl4sBHTVFjMkrGLa2gVmGjNV_UVrA4eOUIl_6ajvynLcBaJX4z-mmJ0v_UkeU8ZC2IMJRqtJVCyCHY2PKvQi5KX8tL02oNj2X4tM6gCT8s-elSKPyegUc9yoVBGc_evW3YKj85iU65_VHFTlqthgWQHfTFwL97k2z3lPmY35b6YJj_bzVszFelLx9I0fkhGFskTAKBB3JJ1D6wSSiKRl8s2f3AResO2wbD8x3rCoNmtA_9PzF9nH35QqH8ccrHRfzyJqlMjIM_An8vmhkrbVbWY8lqRIK9rqvFaUswAsfBJ8Yg-MlRhfpT4Pymgnae6csF_1IG4wXch6bwiYTAMc-rMQd8cKlUIGEbmAMnaB5xnIyQQMqlP39)

body:

Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Your Endorsement: No Signature on Record

Friends ––

Alex knows that in order to pass a Green New Deal or Medicare for All,
it’s going to take an unprecedented grassroots operation supporting us
along the way.

One of the ways we planned to get there is by raising 2,500 small-dollar
donations online last month to help Alex win reelection so we can hold our
Senate majority.

Another way we plan on staying in the fight is by having people like you
personally endorse our campaign. So far, hundreds of you have signed on to
say you have Alex’s back, and we’re hoping to add another 5,000 people to
that number this month.

So that’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen yet on
our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement.

Being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for

striving for.

body:
We’re racing to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight, and my team just let me know that we need another 100 supporters to step up if we’re going to get there in time.
#
This will be quick, Peter.
We’re racing to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight, and my team just let me know that we need another 100 supporters to step up if we’re going to get there in time.
We’re already off to a fantastic start in this campaign. I’m so proud and excited to be in this fight with all of you. But keeping up this momentum is a must if we’re going to defend our majority.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: Reproductive Justice is on the ballot in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4447eb309e38/reproductive-justice-is-on-the-ballot-in-virginia?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b7a0d2515e&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Let's be real here, Derek

There is a reason why Glenn Youngkin doesn’t publish his policy platform. He doesn’t want you to know that he gut every reproductive protection Democrats have worked so hard to put in place. He would rather Virginia severely limit people’s rights to their own bodies. For someone who is against Big Government, he weirdly feels comfortable with the state regulating what people should do with their own bodies.

---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=02b5f2e268&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Abortion is healthcare. Plan and simple. It is not always an easy choice that one wants to make but in some cases, it is a medically necessary and often times very emotional choice. And it is clear, with Glenn Youngkin in the Governor’s mansion, that the regressive and dangerous laws we see in Texas and throughout Republican held sates will come here. With the conservative leading Supreme Court looking to hear cases on Abortion and Reproductive Rights very soon, we cannot afford that.
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=7658a94370&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Proud to have stood alongside my friend and fellow AYD, PPAV Executive Director Jamie Lockhart yesterday with Democratic Party of Virginia, Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia, and NARAL Pro-Choice Virginia to let Youngkin know that he may hide behind vague words and limited public stances but Virginians will know the truth about his radical Right-Wing, regressive stances by November.

Vote for the Democratic ticket on November 2. We can't afford to go backwards.
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

---

We can't afford to go backwards. | In Solidarity, Matt Royer | "HELP OUT" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC Our Mailing Address is: PO Box 101547 Arlington, VA 22210 Want to change how you receive these emails? New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee361bce25694dfa9c71c50798e6ef5d&_e=ZgnA-jXb0CUD2cnQB_XTQGtTx_n_BdVgnn_NbrsUyrqElGYOfmpwlMKMOAB9Um6Wi8lwTehNd_lRruurYCB1Rx3LAxGXzPHeQ7ACPnXaANENE-JDYQzyrxuUjoaZbDwh8iQOnLT_2m1A7wxEFowObtk4SGl4RxJKJ8Ow7Jd4rHNaPIRijW2U2SKyQ6AdxYYgJXu4pdtVgUXgFSRY2IR3a8TYAFRYfZ7SlcMn7hLFQy1_vcW0Fide8Zjq2GBV8iHrKN1c3Y_WfbFhhhqC4BhcINS1paEYWe_r5-9PISfexV--Aa1kzlPLJ0yI_LrvfjzjYtotySOyVzXWD0_Pr1R19F2pzftgnxP9cf-SXzFIRGmSSJUkRKSkGHk9zUQIjJm_gfU4JK2MXsWjAF5_GZ5PsFXlO2o01ApYp-tk25PYhCPh2mvQBge3a-QtmwYsM-GMrxLvyWEIZ7_729Srg0Qg-2f8w0GHJXa2ir4URLEWK0U%3D)

Peter - Can you believe this?

New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops.

I hope this threat is all bluster from left-wing New York politicians, but I'm afraid it's not.

If government limits a commercial business because the business exercises its First Amendment rights, it would set a horrible precedent. **It would also be ferociously opposed by many Members of Congress,_including me._**

When federal funds are shared with states, it never enters my mind to look at the politics of the state on hot-button social issues to determine whether they should be eligible to receive funding. Such a move by New York against Chick-fil-A would create unnecessary upheaval at a time when the country needs to move forward in respecting sincerely held differences of opinion.

The actions by the Left in New York make one thing clear: **"cancel culture" has run amok in America, and it is more important than ever to have elected officials who will stand up to these ridiculous ploys by the Radical Left.**

**That's why we need to reclaim the majority in the United States Senate.**

From rising inflation to chaos at the southern border, it's clear that the Democrats' control in Washington is dangerous to the future of our nation. We must do whatever we can to restore the conservative reforms of the last 4 years, **[but I need your help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee361bce25694dfa9c71c50798e6ef5d&_e=ZgnA-jXb0CUD2cnQB_XTQGtTx_n_BdVgnn_NbrsUyrqElGYOfmpwlMKMOAB9Um6Wi8lwTehNd_lRruurYCB1Rx3LAxGXzPHeQ7ACPnXaANENE-JDYQzyrxuUjoaZbDwh8iQOnLT_2m1A7wxEFowObtk4SGl4RxJKJ8Ow7Jd4rHNaPIRijW2U2SKyQ6AdxYYgJXu4pdtVgUXgFSRY2IR3a8TYAFRYfZ7SlcMn7hLFQy1_vcW0Fide8Zjq2GBV8iHrKN1c3Y_WfbFhhhqC4BhcIHXAz61OzgSMh2DJuP5_ekkhICbqdDwdVtZL2xD3hsCew5HYsPKXeIZxKMPk3CKIbL9EYG7svOWtukf0yhve3eXpoT2HY6-f6xZFi8j-AW7v16_qKPUwaG3OaYpBiutIR8VG7vBt7punT73Ycv2QCmPiboX9qoaopWhqvgigEEHn4XWkcwIBPLi2ZO0n8iyVfXP5hHGXpQEYI9p9XgzgXh8%3D)**

Chick-fil-A is a lawful business with a great product. I love their food, their service, and their people. No private company, including Chick-fil-A, should be punished for their beliefs.

**[Will you join me in standing up to the Radical Left and "cancel culture"? Will you donate $5 or $10 to help us beat some of these liberals next year and Restore the Majority in the Senate?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee361bce25694dfa9c71c50798e6ef5d&_e=ZgnA-jXb0CUD2cnQB_XTQGtTx_n_BdVgnn_NbrsUyrqElGYOfmpwlMKMOAB9Um6Wi8lwTehNd_lRruurYCB1Rx3LAxGXzPHeQ7ACPnXaANENE-JDYQzyrxuUjoaZbDwh8iQOnLT_2m1A7wxEFowObtk4SGl4RxJKJ8Ow7Jd4rHNaPIRijW2U2SKyQ6AdxYYgJXu4pdtVgUXgFSRY2IR3a8TYAFRYfZ7SlcMn7hLFQy1_vcW0Fide8Zjq2GBV8iHrKN1c3Y_WfbFhhhqC4BhcII5LXPLAtwA0Kpfbq37X-LfZxLi-42sq4tYrc-EcrRX4u_C001Z1bPTEDKdc94Gm1OY0RWnsJi7ik1_u0H44d7deU2vdJhHENigqNHRe9cmokuKPeUX314dz8cXZ4V5Iv2Id54Qwcp4uBCrK0gDSDtDBLKb3tcEqxea0a7rH1rmf6PEk1XanpwiIw3m0bwHm484ex_xv0KwCcTNmELl10M4%3D)**

I hope you're with me, Peter.

Lindsey Graham
