subject: Critical Race Theory in Schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Have you heard that the Biden Administration just released a statement backing the nationwide teaching of Critical Race Theory curricula? Biden and... Peter, Have you heard that the Biden Administration just released a statement backing the nationwide teaching of Critical Race Theory curricula? [](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=671833fa666a4f1e81614d83486266cd&_e=T7d4Kk_kGA3t7od0UVMI1bdy9-db94V9E_31QnFS_DycvGkmVPQy_fyDx2WFpvY-2lhv6CmVtLsgeX-u4KgUWrRZMSEJ_gi5-fM_h6xTPn2XQs3GMwQA14Q02TDt5IKu0glwOxgyDQY1vQjl8SsSPtJfJlYxgS6W9jeJ5ihZy30rc4MFAgZgLscUbe-tkzzz-xbYnBtOgE0dGjWNPvoK__KsG3SD_BoRDCEqbG3AyAnHwlAoTKvc4SbmUp-CLkuWRpTaexZmi8WrxpKi4DWWOPw4MjZwPstRHQKo1tqApGn23XwwlGB80565SilclDZGAPdMSjslb_k9y963u3-LYb8KiGom5soT_v9Ycbkc3rJvV40HX4yqTX3fHg6RD-Ar9RL76m9DI41-fY2Z8hTGLAHH7XhSjOxmLGVYACum2ueiXCeRG_ziEgFGUARct_2-) Biden and members of the far left like Gavin Newsom claim that falsely teaching that America is systematically racist is part of our history, and that people today and throughout history should not be judged based on their character, but on their race and the color of their skin. It is clear that Joe Biden and Gavin Newsom are not trying to better this fine nation or this fine state by pushing Critical Race Theory on it. **They have an agenda to divide the nation based on the race of its citizens. ** Now, I want to know what you think of Critical Race Theory and the plan of making it a nationwide taught curriculum within schools. [**Do you think Critical Race Theory should be taught in our schools?**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=671833fa666a4f1e81614d83486266cd&_e=T7d4Kk_kGA3t7od0UVMI1bdy9-db94V9E_31QnFS_DycvGkmVPQy_fyDx2WFpvY-2lhv6CmVtLsgeX-u4KgUWrRZMSEJ_gi5-fM_h6xTPn2XQs3GMwQA14Q02TDt5IKu0glwOxgyDQY1vQjl8SsSPtJfJlYxgS6W9jeJ5ihZy30rc4MFAgZgLscUbe-tkzzz2DCWkNxqVVQrHpMElqN5C7A94Et0SDsYl8lrXn7cdHm8CLJ-WeBl-yLjK4QYohZpyHYLVyu7v_HZFQfvqslJCrGKseYVZue2iW_KuMhtRDJOarRPx7jxvqRNOErNeSfEDUhXwR2UI4NKqCSTMcWc0_45jdiGyW5UJLY_qwwtjLzpb8YVAHaLqMRcEx38xlbTL43lZpuN9WU_xu3CgipwQgjFJy1_v0_acMveStUAQnJZK7TeVu2aSmvIuFGKHnNY) [**YES**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=671833fa666a4f1e81614d83486266cd&_e=T7d4Kk_kGA3t7od0UVMI1bdy9-db94V9E_31QnFS_DycvGkmVPQy_fyDx2WFpvY-2lhv6CmVtLsgeX-u4KgUWrRZMSEJ_gi5-fM_h6xTPn2XQs3GMwQA14Q02TDt5IKu0glwOxgyDQY1vQjl8SsSPtJfJlYxgS6W9jeJ5ihZy30rc4MFAgZgLscUbe-tkzzzn2QiPpPcI6XriraGodBv2yoJc2uQsmzf_dyiDdQZWQk97OLMNATb5n7SUpaqUPyYSppVfG52i_TyRDvyI2yRkoOmIXvroGkkIQPIScy4u43TuAly3UT7zhtla8-cRUXK28VpZvxK1ZT9vRawNNt0-XyBHQEn9Wh8OmZOO18NQ4VICKNaAX20NbE2kxQoBPToZ48-3e4hxjD9-8PchUevAqKm_E0LRGZcvI5G6k5uW2m5_Z1dXDIseLZI8t50CVK4) [**NO**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=671833fa666a4f1e81614d83486266cd&_e=T7d4Kk_kGA3t7od0UVMI1bdy9-db94V9E_31QnFS_DycvGkmVPQy_fyDx2WFpvY-2lhv6CmVtLsgeX-u4KgUWrRZMSEJ_gi5-fM_h6xTPn2XQs3GMwQA14Q02TDt5IKu0glwOxgyDQY1vQjl8SsSPtJfJlYxgS6W9jeJ5ihZy30rc4MFAgZgLscUbe-tkzzzZHPlSSGobnU2zTXEYTgFF400ywm_uidZF5SS2jiMylDp3u-Om-xHSCgDr-UNXQ_UrMAAYnRHYR4BxouDNVyCXGXkKbFZq83GkEKQyUHqaJaquOv93EFEflr9MfXYvI8vawEfuV-GKojoIyeRBuA-MVflqjdW6unyOiREOxsncwDt4yhW2iFXzjlsbXCU1uXnhsnCkIGyNTRQQtFCW7Uvc6T7JthCM--wpBogb-FXx5W1_JIx0dBt-M_l0ajrC0DR) The Biden administration is working to divide Americans and plant the seed of hatred in future generations. In his role as their biggest cheerleader, Gavin Newsom is complicit in the Biden administration’s state-sponsored racism. There are many ways to make sure that equality is upheld and that racism is put to an end - but forcing Critical Race Theory upon our children in schools will only bring about more hurt. Schools are meant to be a place of learning and growth, not a place of forcing political agenda upon children. Gavin Newsom and his radical left allies should not be allowed to turn the education system into a system of pushing agendas on children. [**Do you believe children should go to class everyday, being taught that the great country they live in is systematically racist, and that they are racist just because their skin is a certain color?****Let us know what you think here. **](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=671833fa666a4f1e81614d83486266cd&_e=T7d4Kk_kGA3t7od0UVMI1bdy9-db94V9E_31QnFS_DycvGkmVPQy_fyDx2WFpvY-2lhv6CmVtLsgeX-u4KgUWrRZMSEJ_gi5-fM_h6xTPn2XQs3GMwQA14Q02TDt5IKu0glwOxgyDQY1vQjl8SsSPtJfJlYxgS6W9jeJ5ihZy30rc4MFAgZgLscUbe-tkzzzugjbhh08iwOZVkd86BGX52MIcbFINVlZq9HRsE42YxwYa9V5QRxP1_ruBvrG9RabADxf5hiBMaMVakL6xUgdcWyUQM9pgHJyVD0vSbm7Qyb7yaFncCDf_vMDPFHvL4eGI91ZU5faDRqsT7g-oFGQXECGQazWMwpSeupUgPbIkZ-CnWxxtqIlfqVAaJzWePE9T2BHsq2woq_s9ZVzumxUPncbi_Fwgzv3Ohnc8LNBHZTISN7BOFJ9DbCS1qE7V6dn) Newsom has had every opportunity to keep these dangerous, divisive ideas out of California schools, but has cowered away from defending the values and ideas that make our country great. clean_body: Have you heard that the Biden Administration just released a statement backing the nationwide teaching of Critical Race Theory curricula? Biden and... Peter, Have you heard that the Biden Administration just released a statement backing the nationwide teaching of Critical Race Theory curricula? - Biden and members of the far left like Gavin Newsom claim that falsely teaching that America is systematically racist is part of our history, and that people today and throughout history should not be judged based on their character, but on their race and the color of their skin. It is clear that Joe Biden and Gavin Newsom are not trying to better this fine nation or this fine state by pushing Critical Race Theory on it. They have an agenda to divide the nation based on the race of its citizens. Now, I want to know what you think of Critical Race Theory and the plan of making it a nationwide taught curriculum within schools. The Biden administration is working to divide Americans and plant the seed of hatred in future generations. In his role as their biggest cheerleader, Gavin Newsom is complicit in the Biden administration’s state-sponsored racism. There are many ways to make sure that equality is upheld and that racism is put to an end - but forcing Critical Race Theory upon our children in schools will only bring about more hurt. Schools are meant to be a place of learning and growth, not a place of forcing political agenda upon children. Gavin Newsom and his radical left allies should not be allowed to turn the education system into a system of pushing agendas on children. Newsom has had every opportunity to keep these dangerous, divisive ideas out of California schools, but has cowered away from defending the values and ideas that make our country great. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Don’t get “Fauci-ed”
body:
In Florida, we chose freedom over Faucism.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNxeew33EFJHmEIRCQKkiaxFs0MqHre-ImraPN43CyCdXB3ymaOOSoJtw2cNFfnMD6gUOVa32t8bDj_XoO2LV_JfI1hotttG4D19v0epLSxlXTic96LEzVvqNqmsrYjY_9cYpkiSKmjOA6IP-zm1zg==&c=4EN0gZObCJ-qaJvXvC8xwS1-trzi75x7SsLuRCSMJ5tQWtqT6ij2Zw==&ch=hNn-sc8A11i1dPDPR-uXXfcXMcJ_yS756rtyUVpHis1PQQjgccNZWQ==)
---
| Peter,
I protected Floridians from getting Fauci-ed by keeping schools open, saving jobs and preserving freedom.
And now, yet again, corporate media are attacking me for having the backbone to call Fauci out for the damage he has caused.
I refused to blindly follow Dr. Fauci, an unelected career government bureaucrat, and allow him to strip Floridians of their God-given freedoms. I chose to lift Florida up, not follow the lead of Dr. Fauci and lock Florida down.
Dr. Fauci demanded the rest of us wear masks, even as he was photographed at a baseball game not wearing one himself. Now, he STILL wants to force your children as young as 3 YEARS OLD to wear a mask!
[Choose Freedom Over Faucism >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNxeew33EFJHmEIRCQKkiaxFs0MqHre-ImraPN43CyCdXB3ymaOOSkyBSF67fAB54BexE1Kph-NAktYYdmIaaUOAYYwQmINmLzT0XM3Eoz1b_3ulSufvUaEFiaUPbxkmp6_TmylurGWThmgwrkS9Pgej77R-MqNBX85gCv1RPAt6JBgoHr-kxi6YN8CvnpjGNlcFXeoMJVz3D6lmpGJ_ew==&c=4EN0gZObCJ-qaJvXvC8xwS1-trzi75x7SsLuRCSMJ5tQWtqT6ij2Zw==&ch=hNn-sc8A11i1dPDPR-uXXfcXMcJ_yS756rtyUVpHis1PQQjgccNZWQ==)
Newly released emails from Dr. Fauci are now shining sunlight on the revelation that Dr. Fauci likely KNEW key details in early 2020 about the likelihood that COVID-19 escaped from a lab in Wuhan. Yet, in all of his public remarks, he has INSISTED it did not leak from the lab and that United States funding of "gain of function" research played no role.
Fauci is a corporate media darling and media elites have been parroting Fauci's lockdown happy policies and helping him obscure the truth about COVID's origins every step of the way. They are attacking me because I have helped to expose them for the charlatans that they are.
I need your help to fight back against Fauci's media henchmen and to keep Florida free. [Please rush in a donation of $25!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNxeew33EFJHmEIRCQKkiaxFs0MqHre-ImraPN43CyCdXB3ymaOOSkyBSF67fAB54BexE1Kph-NAktYYdmIaaUOAYYwQmINmLzT0XM3Eoz1b_3ulSufvUaEFiaUPbxkmp6_TmylurGWThmgwrkS9Pgej77R-MqNBX85gCv1RPAt6JBgoHr-kxi6YN8CvnpjGNlcFXeoMJVz3D6lmpGJ_ew==&c=4EN0gZObCJ-qaJvXvC8xwS1-trzi75x7SsLuRCSMJ5tQWtqT6ij2Zw==&ch=hNn-sc8A11i1dPDPR-uXXfcXMcJ_yS756rtyUVpHis1PQQjgccNZWQ==)
[You can also check out our new "Don't Fauci my Florida" merchandise at our new store. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNxeew33EFJHmEIRCQKkiaxFs0MqHre-ImraPN43CyCdXB3ymaOOSj1qudwZs31Ecjyk76B3b1o-p3Ycs4Glk3vfPeniPOdO8OcPkoVVCRhvE_bbji9sTvk2rOmPFGRPTnLv4Etm0fMIYTl1ObXvZtQqIrDLquLUjr0jPME6FguVhsHGmuj9-a7gWbeRXzHWmlGqeKoCVhL6WljAvxbGllMC_SajfL1Tn8WJISXI-86kCAC3x1bbb_iwSVlixFcPWLGp9AaSTjPhRevOW0Cr6nDKa8EFvGDYNVf17NX1jdsxnFSKXWYpUi6Q9j6UfDAcjHI3ahZ9PkM=&c=4EN0gZObCJ-qaJvXvC8xwS1-trzi75x7SsLuRCSMJ5tQWtqT6ij2Zw==&ch=hNn-sc8A11i1dPDPR-uXXfcXMcJ_yS756rtyUVpHis1PQQjgccNZWQ==)
Thank you for joining us in choosing Freedom over Faucism!
Governor Ron DeSantis

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

****

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

clean_body: Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way ar VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. ** Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. **. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: Dividing and conquering America from within
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
Critical Race Theory plays right into the hands of the CCP’s goal to divide and conquer America... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=a5aae3f0c50c4d3389b450812903c487&_e=RlbQAzRrv2g7vjFd5MfFUIUxu5u9aAOA1ogBzRdNlbz-PnVcynigSHeN97Lcn_PIrIx6V3DY0vKaZ3oOjv0IDAcUHslFKr0xeKfFNhNo-Tjroj_ZeqpLMC877f-xKLwSMNDgpn9hmTekrlNYGoi6Wz44GzddAEiWboLUOD7QxK4Dqz_xKFmlsWLX0mrmFXoKfol_tBZm-KPuewbXYu0VYykn9xHl463_8xn-os3ftRQ_DWpVxW5hFUuygjMdzYNqt9dONL5-C3MSxp5i_vI3BQ5CJVBTNpyxXxGiZKnuWDyArY_k2a7VrRJMJ9wpX_M4KXzC_GKh5Mh1Pp8xOjYOAXdxqP5PNr8b4xHQsR9fSGwD4M5pTOUKFh5OB05kDsPldCucgirBa26NUBlD72Rex5PMM3RGaavcAIQ3tuJRQF_AjlWi1tmVZfQTKiLP7Q4kXAG7MmhoXOCzIdNImYJ1zg%3D%3D) Peter, Concerned parents, students, and teachers are standing up and speaking out against Critical Race Theory at school board meetings across the country. I’m with them. This radical, woke ideology suggests America is an irredeemably flawed and structurally racist nation. Kids are being taught to hate America, the most free and most prosperous country in human history, but they are not being taught to read, write and do basic arithmetic. In short, it’s indoctrination instead of education. It’s a complete rejection of Martin Luther King's vision for a colorblind society and it plays right into the hands of the Chinese Communist Party’s goal to divide and conquer America from within. It also contributes to the increasing mediocrity of our education system. [**PITCH IN: DEFEND AMERICA**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=a5aae3f0c50c4d3389b450812903c487&_e=RlbQAzRrv2g7vjFd5MfFUIUxu5u9aAOA1ogBzRdNlbz-PnVcynigSHeN97Lcn_PIrIx6V3DY0vKaZ3oOjv0IDAcUHslFKr0xeKfFNhNo-Tjroj_ZeqpLMC877f-xKLwSMNDgpn9hmTekrlNYGoi6Wz44GzddAEiWboLUOD7QxK4Dqz_xKFmlsWLX0mrmFXoKfol_tBZm-KPuewbXYu0VYykn9xHl463_8xn-os3ftRQ_DWpVxW5hFUuygjMdzYNqbAeqhH-TWNJ8j95grSosRa3UhvxLgBS4zlElgy5rboZX2a95D_0JNIQ9LSjBnoHchLNujAJ9NOT2Zy0wd41YNQQdmpkcaR7nN6aGOGG5IKipFmhb8AXsv6T2FiwX_7Lb70369kstxaCdWiUC2JBlHKhM8VGhHbIrf2facysUVhWytwCr_f-ovZEEw-_iNedJyjNfC7bLRl-rbmYkqUcvcw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, this woke agenda has even infiltrated the upper ranks of our military.

**But it’s clear that this fight is just getting started.**

I’m doing everything in my power to get this destructive ideology out of our classrooms so that America’s next generation of leaders is taught to appreciate and uphold the principles that make America the greatest country in the history of the world. I am fighting to restore America's position as a world leader in education, so that every Wisconsin kid has access to a world-class education, regardless of the color of their skin or the circumstances of their birth.

_But I need you with me._

clean_body: Critical Race Theory plays right into the hands of the CCP’s goal to divide and conquer America... Peter, Concerned parents, students, and teachers are standing up and speaking out against Critical Race Theory at school board meetings across the country. I’m with them. This radical, woke ideology suggests America is an irredeemably flawed and structurally racist nation. Kids are being taught to hate America, the most free and most prosperous country in human history, but they are not being taught to read, write and do basic arithmetic. In short, it’s indoctrination instead of education. It’s a complete rejection of Martin Luther King's vision for a colorblind society and it plays right into the hands of the Chinese Communist Party’s goal to divide and conquer America from within. It also contributes to the increasing mediocrity of our education system. | | Peter, this woke agenda has even infiltrated the upper ranks of our military. But it’s clear that this fight is just getting started. I’m doing everything in my power to get this destructive ideology out of our classrooms so that America’s next generation of leaders is taught to appreciate and uphold the principles that make America the greatest country in the history of the world. I am fighting to restore America's position as a world leader in education, so that every Wisconsin kid has access to a world-class education, regardless of the color of their skin or the circumstances of their birth. But I need you with me. Mike Gallagher | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: I believe there’s so much more to be done. | = Peter, = | = As a community member, running for office was never part of my plan. My hard-working immigrant parents taught me from a young age to fight for my beliefs and give back to my community. With everything I’ve seen, I simply couldn’t turn my back on my community when they needed help. From the Affordable Care Act to the Child Tax Credit, I’m proud to say House Democratic work in Congress is helping the middle-class bounce back from this pandemic. And I mean this when I say it: This movement would be impossible without your support, Peter. But I’ll be blunt now: If Democrats don’t hold onto the House in 2022, it’s going to be impossible to get anything else done for the working class. And as Republicans work to undermine President Biden’s legislative agenda and undo all of the progress we’ve paved so far, I need your support again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, \-- Tony | | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: from my press release
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
In case you missed my recent press release on Bill Lee's unacceptable actions regarding vaccine outreach to kids:
"However, his latest action to fire Dr. Michelle Fiscus, his silence on reports that the Tennessee Department of Health has decided to halt all vaccine outreach to kids, and the issuance of an order to Tennessee Health officials to not acknowledge that August is National Immunization Awareness Month, set a dangerous new precedent. The Governor has abandoned the most consequential compact between the people of Tennessee and its government: to promote the general welfare of every citizen."
This is what the TNDP is fighting against. Which is why I'm asking one more time for your help reaching our mid-month goal. I know it's a lot, but we really do appreciate your support.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.

subject: $830 short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793
body:
There’s nothing Republican Madison Cawthorn won’t say or do to score more political points

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32464905/295855923/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTg2OThjOC1jOGU1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6Boq9Y2qARttfV3kX0mGi8qiGenfsW-WWqtRhiz-QM=)
---
I’m disgusted.

My opponent Madison Cawthorn should be spending his time helping my community.

**Instead, Cawthorn spreads dangerous misinformation.** He spoke in front of thousands and grossly lied about our vaccine rollout.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I’m pleading with you, Peter, you’re my only hope.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I'll be honest. I'm concerned about being outraised.
|
---
| | | Peter, I'll be honest. I'm concerned about being outraised.

_Fox News_ just wrote that my race against radical Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings could be the most expensive Senate race ever, and I believe it! We just learned that in only 21 days, Val Demings raised $4.6 MILLION.

21 Days. 21 Days is all it took for her to outraise me for the ENTIRE Quarter. It's more clear than ever Chuck and Nancy are willing to do whatever it takes to replace me with one of their puppets and elect a Trump Impeachment Manager to the US Senate.

In addition to all this, _CNN_ moved my race against Val Demings up on its list of the Top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. The warning signs are popping up left and right, but there's one thing the media doesn't see: **_the conservatives like you who know the stakes and know when it 's time to step up and chip in. _**

Well, Peter, if you were waiting to step up, now's the time. We need you now more than ever. _**[We are asking every patriot who gets this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we've lost to radical Val Demings.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945529:61AdBflND:m:1:3253819041:FC689EF080109542798765DF4D8C2B36:r "We are asking every patriot who gets
this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we’ve lost to radical Val Demings.")**_ **We can 't afford a single person to ignore this email:**

---
| | [SEND $18 ASAP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945529:61AdBflND:m:1:3253819041:FC689EF080109542798765DF4D8C2B36:r "SEND $18 ASAP >>")
---

**I 'm relying on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to carry me across the finish line. **These crazy numbers that Val is putting up just show the IMPORTANCE of each and every patriot stepping up and doing their part. _**[So, I'm pleading with you, don't let us lose -- donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945530:61AdBflND:m:1:3253819041:FC689EF080109542798765DF4D8C2B36:r "So, I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today. ")**_

Thank you for your help,
Marco Rubio

---

name: John Castorani
subject: 200 donations needed by midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I can’t self-fund, I don’t own my own business which I can mortgage to fund my campaign, and I don’t come from family money, but I love the USAToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=1d5d2dea2e694621a8b2e7e35c27de7e&_t=SCufilr_Wk-n_sZzIlU8eFCAA0mhIFUMdu-OGksWSedVsLqDxpd0WUDUPBdH1JnFQcz8V3shCjyMtvlOgbtx5GekwYelJ0X4jCXfY8qS3bt29yswL_G17LAVGhyzyhLfLMzdTIHw3IjCissEuQlhrZtjpbAyf4t8LZVs8UioVHs%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=1d5d2dea2e694621a8b2e7e35c27de7e&_e=_QqHr6en2L6OS3BVM0A-HqOvRa0vcWC2t31s3aMy6iREMfg7BdlkOMUACDE6XckyfB6P0nv9vhxMC4qo2nUkoMN7gq0oXuKRBYXmgAQXE00bFMkvn-LPYl8Pxnagladt-w9wXeoyoEm5zAnZiRK89z8L7s4DFi6W5GxS90-3BPvdZzpnExiHxfjY97Ri1iMJKhPdCOoUrZ8xc33F8R_9HGgxRsG0uohbBPVvRPhfuIon3p8GOE-5FiAvEQZOiJmQzqXTD-Xu7Ksmz-NzJIvFgW3Hs3EtN6Gh_0IVexUtNmmP3gfCEYfjUokta0fZsTO9UbrvHOurULHsnxBauHp_oMfXGTdNYfqdjgPB86CVPJGVfKVL6CPAw50GR27B_pFIeDz3sa1BmjiVhuLztSJbpBswNcLCH7xBDrw94OKveBCGSHq32pWqCtW7tXs3_XMvY6n0oFCVFk6uiXNfNcOb6veTDXssNpMajdI87FpMEj4%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Chances are you probably don’t live in Virginia’s 7th district and don’t know just how important a role it’s going to play in the upcoming battle for the U.S. House. But you have signed up to receive emails from me or made a donation to my campaign for Congress before today. Thank you.

**Now to the reason I’m emailing you today**. I’m not a reporter – **I’m a former intelligence officer** – but I do read the news every morning and yesterday I was a little surprised to learn that another Republican (I now have three competitors) had decided to throw their hat in the ring for a chance to take on the Democrat currently representing VA-07, Abigail Spanberger.

I’m not sure where Fox News was when I declared my candidacy back in April, but this is how they describe my race now:

“ _**Battle in Virginia’s 7th District with Dem Rep. Spanberger likely key race to determine whether GOP wins back House**_.”

I can’t self-fund, I don’t own my own business which I can mortgage to fund my campaign, and I don’t come from family money, **but one thing I do have going for me is that I love this country so damn much**. Since I launched my campaign back in April, some 4,800 conservatives have made a gift to my campaign to help me and my team start building out the infrastructure we need to flip this seat.

**[Today marks the midpoint of July and we’ve set an internal goal of finally cracking the 5,000-donor threshold by midnight tonight, meaning, I’m asking 200 conservatives reading this to make a gift to my campaign of any amount](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=1d5d2dea2e694621a8b2e7e35c27de7e&_e=_QqHr6en2L6OS3BVM0A-HqOvRa0vcWC2t31s3aMy6iREMfg7BdlkOMUACDE6XckyfB6P0nv9vhxMC4qo2nUkoMN7gq0oXuKRBYXmgAQXE00bFMkvn-LPYl8Pxnagladt-w9wXeoyoEm5zAnZiRK89z8L7s4DFi6W5GxS90-3BPvdZzpnExiHxfjY97Ri1iMJKhPdCOoUrZ8xc33F8R_9HGgxRsG0uohbBPVvRPhfuIon3p8GOE-5FiAvEQZOiJmQzqXTD-Xu7Ksmz-NzJIvFgauxr6HtnogLloEmBC8lLatbf7aFV4nWP4mHxjS2_94Df33_Y5LnpxqWIe6Sesz0To1_ZUcXrrUsQPX3Vsex86gaFH8jt-RnJWvLleS9wuaSSOxotpFzeStBUT_Pg0FcjnNOt_D8VLFq65pjqR3-UzR41q68YM-AUdAIQQ3sz_L7A4vvhlJWyTAUXcHztaNPea0_SgBrHMXppUymLmO393E%3D)**.
| [**200 DONATIONS NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=1d5d2dea2e694621a8b2e7e35c27de7e&_e=_QqHr6en2L6OS3BVM0A-HqOvRa0vcWC2t31s3aMy6iREMfg7BdlkOMUACDE6XckyfB6P0nv9vhxMC4qo2nUkoMN7gq0oXuKRBYXmgAQXE00bFMkvn-LPYl8Pxnagladt-w9wXeoyoEm5zAnZiRK89z8L7s4DFi6W5GxS90-3BPvdZzpnExiHxfjY97Ri1iMJKhPdCOoUrZ8xc33F8R_9HGgxRsG0uohbBPVvRPhfuIon3p8GOE-5FiAvEQZOiJmQzqXTD-Xu7Ksmz-NzJIvFgbxWrjITHYmQC4W9R0VuwDo9ubQHP3YFa7tZG2ynhXaHFWcxtpMrRBA6DLBAwuPeswVoSEQFChgssToCPagjjwAEQJ3TjO-KXnSfMPCSzRdheIBwW6BKfkS55e4hGJyvAuSZmmi57uXBqBgrACTzcM1mB3Fxee1IklJAnih1Qch5F7XUUjmKTjLudyvHZSjMPaYw9nMuN4LON6UifJCAQHo%3D)
---

**Our country’s future depends on being able to mobilize generous donors like yourself**. God knows Nancy Pelosi burning the midnight oil as she raised millions to defend this seat from the Republican Party.

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=1d5d2dea2e694621a8b2e7e35c27de7e&_e=_QqHr6en2L6OS3BVM0A-HqOvRa0vcWC2t31s3aMy6iREMfg7BdlkOMUACDE6XckyfB6P0nv9vhxMC4qo2nUkoMN7gq0oXuKRBYXmgAQXE00bFMkvn-LPYl8Pxnagladt-w9wXeoyoEm5zAnZiRK89z8L7s4DFi6W5GxS90-3BPvdZzpnExiHxfjY97Ri1iMJKhPdCOoUrZ8xc33F8R_9HGgxRsG0uohbBPVvRPhfuIon3p8GOE-5FiAvEQZOiJmQzqXTD-Xu7Ksmz-NzJIvFgUPIl-eYfUlLCa1IeDxs1DQgF6YGES4sk13QBAsjUGRb-3pt49MDm0Iv7pbKnmj0eT_feTFG6doV96pp3eMmfAVWS0OPkgqkMzOSq5_1WlDRlnTdeoO6a_OCSn5lOWBLrY099bKBIkaqCBgQqjWaKEWkP_5Bhky44F6lhRJeFD6UwrybqAjJfsIm20gfYXqJ80vSZff3_ph58mG4pWsSPlI%3D)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

Since I launched my campaign back in April, some 4,800 conservatives have made a gift to my campaign to help me and my team start building out the infrastructure we need to flip this seat. . | Our country’s future depends on being able to mobilize generous donors like yourself. God knows Nancy Pelosi burning the midnight oil as she raised millions to defend this seat from the Republican Party. In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ7mryyTwQm_uOCNgzvqBZVyjXRuQbBjEu9dKYaDqwEIm2EdlF6tieIfOoIOF4yC1Jwm71n6eoec4CMfzXMavl5h8M9p6LxUwqJsjGSANFc_rR6L16UBLy_330hsOOP31pI-Tz_gW3qJs4ASKi_0-rpIekrVbm8AHdA9w6lPYIqlYLb8cIzp-oBsS_j6J8mjgRIThlJwWkjlRXiPkPrsziFk%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian.

But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJyGlspw5F2cf8rDlD2BJNPWsY4ZBHM5tJemHPSQrhxdsYg6YYwTSEySIJ2OSPXjp7Fb3saTEUF-AuUSaferFQxLpWRBlc1ubmCXNAf7za4j0DvVVDjVdsTFLmnyn6p5dqc2uDrlXdfB6H5lMaMAf6Sll8fmTUYjaK9dKFH91FwS92CbJPi_J0SoL7V0fU3wvD6e5JJnYQPs_bxwDNKQ7npM%3D)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats’ full control of our state before it’s too late, fellow conservative. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ130osA72wMJA_hdI1EwRpuol8pTzFdV6Z3XK1b6bAzqliM932y0hOCpPK2DWKOz1_MBkSvc30p7Vk3FT8ADQnPddfGzELWaVN_7OtfmIJxuYPmQuy7-ilGFprTptTtInKI1DFFLqmcBwfSMHc4tlI4wRq8Z2B69RXpn-q24fPLZQz6rfJEHv8-ZsbZzsuy22HXk_nUUr0T_93pjmoG1pSU%3D)

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ5_z21sZYkHrz1KBklQycOAraxN9m0j3tWw3rRTAa1W3aJuTGeeABr9lw3ckHftGqGpCzSFXO50lr5I13EiWToD9xIXD9LIBYytWVM0-zh4-7o0HMzK-UZJ-1ld8rEHHWtFYe887a9Nn5fedPRKMhHXLLfCxqigXJqujIW3i6HulhhJCpI_BcQITBWMpfTJLxtQX22tqj9a34Hpd3TIM4I0%3D)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn’t come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Fellow conservative, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I’m going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ4MJLip9WXpAE7kMR-j_V4t-WmHF9eXNwbGIKpbqao1C-hByMXzWxtCt_OdCwpDJ216TJtQipMA1Uedy9DF_1OFbTMLwIpxVzYJn7MRLEZbVQgGyrP6B_dl5XTmSc6zY3JuSnsUQdXVC0-yUCLeZ0uF4np1WylWMaMo0COH1p_fBnbmhAX6akcMu7ignfJe7NmG2ykfxvoD0SAlZ0SQANRA%3D)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I’m willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ9ZmRh654PYWvNLa7fMdsxsstlTA2PRAsDiwOuZuu3vFiezwaCwrMI0bMi3zXNBsvjQFUDLw56UJKYnAFOXKNe66Gv2wqGDGUoNKILnnhJhioizYmhRUrzVhVo-XThvKxeMLBOHVH-eL58qq1AvU4aAWIKwI8oiMt39cDuN-MleAI6yLqj7EZX-jBRE8CmtXo1Ay7HYAWsBwg14vagMbMeY%3D)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f15674d4fb0741d085f81886c886be4d&_e=aD7EDav6ZmKAdtPYv4Sb2lg9RiClVuUpyDZOiiele9qh0R-OThfMNDZvFYdASb8TncPYi7fhwlApo3yZ_A2YwCaLmLJT4xmMQ6ajJ8Lz0Z8zsTsk9fZnEr959PtlVEDwlUQvRbdk9emTdG8nx5-bJ6J1ZsxdqFTaZjCfxxMBv1FhsliENCDROBZAvVIgpkzw9SNFg65TUlYw6tvkh7DUBIFeraZoDEQUlyzVYHjw22DYVB4Tx26Y1oqE7oMgalyhw93LEAqSb2FXBOwsbEpgiQWCaZ1EmlN11GO3HOVTHEcycKZ_S3QPhbJyGTzANXjrY3z8eQqLl_BYTkMHxn4dK62vVjvQHdCY-ww7yuliV8w%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021

body:
This is big news. | |
---

---
| | PRESS RELEASE ONLY:
TINA RAMIREZ RELEASES HER FIRST ROUND OF ENDORSEMENTS
Friend,

Did you see who endorsed Tina Ramirez for Congress?

Check out this GREAT list of Chesterfield County officials:
* Leslie Haley, Midlothian District Supervisor, Chesterfield County
* Stacey Davenport, Commonwealth’s Attorney, Chesterfield County
* Rebecca Longnaker, Treasurer, Chesterfield County
* Carey Allen, Soil and Water Conservation Director, Chesterfield County
* Ryan Harter, School Board Chair, Chesterfield County
* Debbie Bailey, School Board Member, Chesterfield County

---
| [ADD YOUR NAME TO THE LIST OF ENDORSEMENTS](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=50664863f0&e=ae0ea222da "ADD YOUR NAME TO THE LIST OF ENDORSEMENTS")
---
| As the Republican front-runner for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, Tina is honored and humbled to receive the support of these fantastic public servants.

Her campaign has received unbelievable support since announcing a little under 3 weeks ago. It’s very clear that conservatives in the 7th District are ready for Tina Ramirez to unseat Abigail Spanberger and get our country back on the right track!

[**Join this ever-growing list of grassroots supporters who endorse Tina Ramirez for Congress. >>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ef5fb7cb11&e=ae0ea222da)

We cannot wait to have your endorsement Friend.

-Team Tina

name: Val Demings
subject: Marco Rubio is already attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Before midnight, I need to build a grassroots movement that can fight back | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFITLT4WY49vz0PUwz6prLTgVOEbIDZ-PMo77BJlO2ZRyoVFSJSBoht4hqRyOcpJQ7l0fZGepeX1linVDX4KkSJMRvsGjw3IwmrKQD2j-Dh3oOI5QQ3cMNBU9_YVxW9P9N3uWgbKyB-uTGudSKkQVYgVW8rp3FadeU_d9w5seP97CZXV2VDnPsAglnGVHclGGmJcX67T-DjjgWCVkV7a4rc7T72vZCdfRD8ovp-xtRGYfzRE0X6r4CPZbbCgvGrQNUJ_vr0cRnse9RpO39P3iB_kUV-Q-ieWE_U4XUSa9xnw3lSVGOhd6PJ5-nC62tRrNR1g/3dm/pu2MJB9sRi6H5gr5FgC_dg/h0/n7XtneyoezNRS_znJ6kp6k3H4soiOE80Q4ERdCFik38)
**[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFITLT4WY49vz0PUwz6prLTgXEfzZjPUS5NRipuSRdhHPWEqysRGyex52-VdYgJOebQfikj1SeW9NsmRgKeCmUvSMFFwJMrFBBJIByFZTGc5sAiSzqH29E-BjtGR-x10Dbc4AZWajGE9fxx7y1fjCzV-Z-RPCvul5vGj6wqGQrTA6jOpguRcKDKlVTaHNrugYcz41dLM08Tr5t02FSj62pnaMmoJqA41eV4IZZfWEkyNSlUiqgEBwi4jwI-Gu5SGD_77q147T6i4ig2Gte5hinaMoZU5fbBSVg4dwyko_-xGR5npstpXfkUXO6Xdhz2oB10A/3dm/pu2MJB9sRi6H5gr5FgC_dg/h1/y5bkZoLAOJBJMqUgLUSHRI-9NO0Wk_IDWGX0wx2KZB0)** Marco Rubio is already attacking me, Derek. First in a primetime interview with Fox News host Sean Hannity _and now_ on Twitter, Rubio is taking pages out of his idol Donald Trump's playbook: Divisive rhetoric. Misrepresentations about me. Far-right talking points. He even said he'd "absolutely" welcome the twice-impeached former president on the campaign trail. This is what we're up against, Derek, and it's only the beginning. The worst part is that with Senate control on the line, the full force of the GOP establishment and their dark money allies will pour millions into Florida to prop up Marco Rubio, and Trump will be fanning the flames every step of the way. **That's why we've got to build a grassroots movement that can fight back, here and now, and all the way to the finish line. But we're still falling short of the number of Founding Donors we'd hoped to have at this point.** **** [**With the attacks already beginning, we can't afford shortfalls like this, so can I count on you to split a donation of $15 or more between me and Common Good to become a Founding Donor right now? Every dollar you contribute helps us build the strongest campaign possible to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFITLT4WY49vz0PUwz6prLTgWOAplKhX7pIVQtd6H_G-xyxParXpuQz02yVocru6Bi4OeVJZHakmdSFcUdr4U67gxUpf63BkRyxmOBtL89napsJExyhsHvDjk0rQYWRz0DAdSV3CfUUr9tzSwNPudODKdlKFf3dl9NCVMIDFZHyC3flaXPX3m2npbCMxspLKkve765pDXnSjkgnlMv8W1bsyEPDdS7kTUb_UvN2EJQmL-NMZ4X2g92eFMiXtP_efC4awmQ40UMoSvcnO5sQXvArlSo9OFFRSdzOH6H4xjnwyMPYkWpcQCXARdzJwhG4BNXBA/3dm/pu2MJB9sRi6H5gr5FgC_dg/h2/y82wrx_O5KUMlCJLDvRhZP60_np7Ovjc4nzoNUTYmVM) Thanks for stepping up and having my back from the very beginning, Derek. I have so much faith in this team. Together, we can deliver better leadership for Floridians and defend our majority in the Senate. Val Demings

| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFITLT4WY49vz0PUwz6prLTgU2YB2VvU6t4k8ikJBtsibLCmeFjNr-OsErtn5qcuaoi-0GX1eZzMUC0jBpURGkDjThgjC5dNhC3vvcPud7X7Dw0hhWnrU6la-hNnhExjv4sIlP6WaWHybywGmWkREVz6CLy-l5CbOGQheAXpFhgMMTV9b3WsDn4LQO1-aJx4aX-cN4Y_xOXYJwS6NGPHrBi5tWDzvm6gzR6I9pMIE95kJ3Df-E2Xe7dNL4wpV96hEZquZGcrpsH9ueXorWSF7s2OpwP2n00kcws0UDXqtqH4PsfbWhG7wdOhtmhyNn_uW4zA/3dm/pu2MJB9sRi6H5gr5FgC_dg/h3/5iJTdVNiPxGfGPYNC3f2UkAz_Rl-9ywIh9oztmZzMNk)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden’s Surveillance State 📡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Peter,
The Biden Administration apparently wants to bring Beijing-style surveillance to the United States - reading people’s text messages, going “door to door.” One word: **NO**!

There are legitimate worries that the Biden Administration will pressure mobile carriers into providing the private text messages of private citizens in a brazen attempt to monitor “vaccine misinformation.”

I joined Fox News to talk about the dangerous, unconstitutional actions the Biden Administration is plotting.

_**WATCH HERE**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d7c561518f6141df9f9db3c192f64076&_e=kNZyKqJZon7rcZblxRHYXS2gEqu9Bx-oqVcU5OTjP4jhr6J-pRbPOeNpjim0p978c-5c_b3_JYyVg5CdR2vffAdeNfONvZv7RqpXpjm-BQGKR0kGsyT5VnWRFD1vMaVpTFZ44CSy5rAD7D8RcAIc-Snsbu3rMcz6RD_CdfBo0PJNsULqNtWLRwSYvEd_-Y5-RMQ3pvT5e2W0ralTmIASdMPZ23pC3E2nQU41TTwLn2ClpWlkgntO-1kCm55La1nGzfJc7ECpMDfhmg-hL_XVWAAc4hySzFWzMgdExldOkdqRXAO6nPY8WixVpiRrtWyRakIKg1MneOib22LopB4UJJKraRCsgzTFmy-MA1qUkPdPVE9IvYpu8k6LlXxQLTyLbqYQjRXrihWIkktwr1WWUGQncXAb7B4TEaNs5gQpOMU%3D)
It’s bad enough that the federal government works with big tech to censor and spy on us, but now, they want to read our private text messages?!

It’s **INSANE AND UN-AMERICAN**!

Help me sound the alarm and keep the **BEIJING-STYLE SURVEILLANCE STATE** out of America.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d7c561518f6141df9f9db3c192f64076&_e=kNZyKqJZon7rcZblxRHYXS2gEqu9Bx-oqVcU5OTjP4jhr6J-pRbPOeNpjim0p978c-5c_b3_JYyVg5CdR2vffAdeNfONvZv7RqpXpjm-BQGKR0kGsyT5VnWRFD1vMaVpTFZ44CSy5rAD7D8RcAIc-Snsbu3rMcz6RD_CdfBo0PJNsULqNtWLRwSYvEd_-Y5-RMQ3pvT5e2W0ralTmIASdOyusqf5lkmgiM89nuN6aGKzM3Ljf7REV3-2sAxAsJxVEa69i7VHzkYKreHwxQcsR0dRE5iuYiAx1CVhKZyvWXP8qFYS1IybeNqEdtiethAOVg5RyF9bpVf3Hk6VePfRfCaqCu22wmioLmHn1tyjWdrbZ_UQxchWvqlYV_mzJ5Hy77Y0dy8uFUOFZyVbZ6aT0M5fWJgxxv34nkj70EjPKhg%3D)

Josh

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: then and now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57945564:6xmL9fl0N:m:1:3253819041:545CA14689DB92249C02C68AA6E7B540:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: A trend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lauren, Pramila’s finance director. Over the years working in grassroots fundraising, I’ve noticed a trend: Fundraising slows down during the summer months — _and July is particularly challenging._
2021 is turning out to be no different. But here’s the thing: **Our people-first movement for bold and transformative change doesn’t take the summer off.** This may be an “off-year,” but that doesn’t mean our organizing slows down one bit.
As Congress continues to debate spending priorities, we must continue demanding that any package meets the scale of the overlapping crises our country faces. **But we need your help to sustain this work.**
[**Can you help us reach our mid-month goal of 250 contributions by chipping in $3 or more before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210715?refcode=em20210715-466&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=466_420207_afAM7c&akid=466%2E420207%2EafAM7c)_We’re still 85 contributions short — but yours could put us over the top:_
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210715?refcode=em20210715-466&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=466_420207_afAM7c&akid=466%2E420207%2EafAM7c)**

Over the years working in grassroots fundraising, I’ve noticed a trend: Fundraising slows down during the summer months — and July is particularly challenging. 2021 is turning out to be no different. But here’s the thing: Our people-first movement for bold and transformative change doesn’t take the summer off. This may be an “off-year,” but that doesn’t mean our organizing slows down one bit. As Congress continues to debate spending priorities, we must continue demanding that any package meets the scale of the overlapping crises our country faces. But we need your help to sustain this work. ’re still 85 contributions short — but yours could put us over the top: If we want Democrats to deliver on the promises they made to the American people last year, we have to keep fighting regardless of whether our fundraising dips. But we’d be forced to do so with fewer resources — and we can’t let that happen. Pramila is counting on us. subject: Freedom for Cuba, Dem’s $3.5 trillion infrastructure bill...
body:
lies on voting rights and more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/201b128073c0/freedom-for-cuba-dems-35-trillion-infrastructure-bill?e=f6564bbe3b)

## Freedom for Cuba, Dem’s $3.5 trillion infrastructure bill, lies on voting rights and more...
It’s been a big news week for the middle of July and last night we had a great conversation with Senator John Kennedy from Louisiana that touched on a lot of it. Watch below:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ce070c1f3c&e=f6564bbe3b)
The main take aways: The movement in Cuba is important, yet the Biden administration refuses to support the people of Cuba pursuing freedom.Dems are pushing a $3.5 trillion infrastructure bill that takes irresponsible spending to another level. Let your grandkids know about that bill...Texas House Representatives physically left the state, on a private plane, without masks to block a voting bill from passing- members of the same party that called the filibuster “Jim Crow 2.0” have given filibuster a whole new meaning. (p.s. those [Texas state reps are also picking up a $221 per diem](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f6dae52a7f&e=f6564bbe3b) funded by tax payers)
| | | |

| | | |

|

[By the numbers: Supreme Court splits](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=81913d952e&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via _Axios_ Interesting stats on state Supreme Court party afflictions.

Mark Levin crushed it with his latest book _American Marxism_. It is a genuine look at the issues facing our country and the future compared to every other political book this week from DC reporters clinging to Trump. Sure to be his 7th _New York Times_ best seller -- get a copy here:|

name: Team AOC
subject: Our approach to fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Your contribution isn’t just a name by a number in a database.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210715-2278-header&t=1&akid=2278%2E2526796%2ECDppRV)
We approach fundraising here at Team AOC a bit differently than most other campaigns. **To us, your contribution isn’t just a name by a number in a database.**
Your $3 contribution could help train another tutor as part of our Homework Helpers program.
It could help host a phone bank for volunteers to share important conversations with voters about policies like the Green New Deal.
It could ensure that our team has the resources to mobilize and provide support for other progressive candidates running for office.
And your $3 contribution definitely will help hit our mid-month fundraising goal and ensure we can make long-term investments to keep AOC in office fighting for working families for years to come.
When thousands of grassroots supporters chip in, these $5, $15 or $50 donations added together make incredible things happen. They’ve resulted in over 1,500 tutoring sessions with students, thousands of phone calls and conversations about the Green New Deal, over $5 million raised for Texas relief, 9,000 meals delivered to New Yorkers, and so much more.
**Today is officially our mid-month fundraising deadline. So far, we've seen a tremendous outpouring of support, and we’re so close to hitting our target by the end of the day — but we’ll need a huge boost of support right now to hit our goal.**
[Before midnight, can you make one of the last 1,057 contributions we’re counting on to stay on track for July? We’ll put your contribution right to work building our movement for progressive legislation that puts working people first.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210715-3?refcode=em20210715-2278-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2278_2526796_CDppRV&akid=2278%2E2526796%2ECDppRV)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210715-3?refcode=em20210715-2278-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2278_2526796_CDppRV&akid=2278%2E2526796%2ECDppRV)**
Thank you for making all of this possible.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210715-3?refcode=em20210715-2278-P&t=23&refcode2=2278_2526796_CDppRV&akid=2278%2E2526796%2ECDppRV)**
---

name: Heidi St. John
subject: My Ride-Along With the Vancouver Police Department
body:
I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Hi Friends!

Last Wednesday, I was invited to participate in a ride-along with the Vancouver Police Department. Jeff Anaya has worked as a Law Enforcement Officer (LEO) for twelve years--two where he was trained in Oakland California, and ten here in Vancouver.

I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe. Imagine not knowing whether the day holds a high-speed collision or a close encounter with a loaded weapon. That's what our law enforcement officers deal with when they put on the uniform, and it's why they put in the time, training, and effort that it takes to prepare for the unexpected.

As we drove, I asked Jeff why in the world he would put his life on the line for the citizens of Vancouver. He explained how much he loves his job and described the unique skill set that's necessary to do it--but in all honesty, he didn't need to verbalize his answer. It was clear throughout the evening that he has a deep commitment to the safety of the city and community he works for. He and his wife love where they live, and, like most LEO's, they want their community to thrive.

After all, they are raising their young children here, too.

Before we left the station, a man who appeared to be wearing a hospital ID bracelet approached the vehicle. Jeff engaged the man for about ten minutes, respectfully answering his questions and offering assistance.

It wasn't what the media wants us to see: a white police officer helping a black man. Kindness and respect went both directions. It doesn't fit what most of us are being told right now and yet, that's what I saw.

The timing of my ride along was interesting, because just the day before, I was in Vancouver speaking to a group of voters about my run for Congress. Afterward, a couple approached me and asked, "If you ever get to talk to the police, please ask them why they are not doing their job." They were angry. A "homeless camp" has been set up in their neighborhood.

The citizens of this area have every reason to be frustrated. Tents are being erected by the dozens in neighborhoods and near businesses all over Vancouver. The police have been told that they are not to interfere. Instead, the city is paying for portable toilets and thereby, they encourage these tent cities to grow larger, and more dangerous.

Can you imagine if your house was the location where people with drug addiction and mental illness decided to set up camp?

Could you sell your house for what it was worth? Could you afford move without selling your home? Would you feel safe while drug deals and prostitution were happening on your street and in front of your home? And yet, that's what our citizens are dealing with.

There are dozens of organizations who are dedicated to helping the homeless and drug addicted. There are state and private organizations committed to assisting the mentally ill--but the state and local leadership has decided that these camps are a fine alternative. And so, with no incentive to get clean or get help, the camps grow.

Is this what we want as a community? Somehow, I don't think so.

Officer Anaya pulled a man over who he clocked at 77mph heading westbound on Mill Plain. There was a FELONY WARRANT out for his arrest, but thanks to legislators and bureaucrats in our city, Jeff could do nothing except to issue yet another ticket that will likely never be paid. The man drove away.

And so it went. Over and over, I watched Officer Anaya engage stressful situations with compassion and confidence. It was truly an honor to watch him do his job--and it was frustrating, too. At least twice, he would have opted to take an offender to jail for the safety of Vancouver citizens--but the law prevented him from doing so.

The police can't do their job to keep you safe if the the city officials and State legislators tie their hands. And that's what's happening. Like the WA legislature, Vancouver's gone "woke," and soon, the evidence will be everywhere. Something tells me we will not like the results of such poor leadership.

Is your voice being heard?

Elections have consequences. Every citizen in CD-03 needs to know exactly who is on their City Council. We need to call these people and start asking questions. It's time to engage with our Mayors and our city management. We need to know how judges feel about supporting law enforcement officers and see who is willing to prosecute people who willfully break the law in our beautiful district.

Every community needs leaders--people that our kids and grandkids can look up to. Law enforcement officers across CD-03 put their lives on the line every day to protect and serve the people of our area. They need our support.

Public safety is public service, and that's what police work is all about.

I'm committed to supporting our LEO's in whatever way that I can. We need to stand together and change the narrative that's being pushed about LEO's.

The time is now.
|
---
| | |
---
| A Special Thank You to Our Donors!
Our second quarter fundraising efforts proved successful. We surpassed our goal and made a significant statement to the District. I could not have done this without you and for that I am eternally thankful. This is not just my fight. This is everyone's fight and every donation brings us closer to our goal of reclaiming our nation, our state and our community from those who seek to destroy all we hold dear.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Join Our Team of Volunteers

Helping with an election campaign brings the opportunity for leadership and training sure to get you "off the bench".

clean_body: I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe. | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Hi Friends! Last Wednesday, I was invited to participate in a ride-along with the Vancouver Police Department. Jeff Anaya has worked as a Law Enforcement Officer (LEO) for twelve years--two where he was trained in Oakland California, and ten here in Vancouver. I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe. Imagine not knowing whether the day holds a high-speed collision or a close encounter with a loaded weapon. That's what our law enforcement officers deal with when they put on the uniform, and it's why they put in the time, training, and effort that it takes to prepare for the unexpected. As we drove, I asked Jeff why in the world he would put his life on the line for the citizens of Vancouver. He explained how much he loves his job and described the unique skill set that's necessary to do it--but in all honesty, he didn't need to verbalize his answer. It was clear throughout the evening that he has a deep commitment to the safety of the city and community he works for. He and his wife love where they live, and, like most LEO's, they want their community to thrive. After all, they are raising their young children here, too. Before we left the station, a man who appeared to be wearing a hospital ID bracelet approached the vehicle. Jeff engaged the man for about ten minutes, respectfully answering his questions and offering assistance. It wasn't what the media wants us to see: a white police officer helping a black man. Kindness and respect went both directions. It doesn't fit what most of us are being told right now and yet, that's what I saw. The timing of my ride along was interesting, because just the day before, I was in Vancouver speaking to a group of voters about my run for Congress. Afterward, a couple approached me and asked, "If you ever get to talk to the police, please ask them why they are not doing their job." They were angry. A "homeless camp" has been set up in their neighborhood. The citizens of this area have every reason to be frustrated. Tents are being erected by the dozens in neighborhoods and near businesses all over Vancouver. The police have been told that they are not to interfere. Instead, the city is paying for portable toilets and thereby, they encourage these tent cities to grow larger, and more dangerous. Can you imagine if your house was the location where people with drug addiction and mental illness decided to set up camp? Could you sell your house for what it was worth? Could you afford move without selling your home? Would you feel safe while drug deals and prostitution were happening on your street and in front of your home? And yet, that's what our citizens are dealing with. There are dozens of organizations who are dedicated to helping the homeless and drug addicted. There are state and private organizations committed to assisting the mentally ill--but the state and local leadership has decided that these camps are a fine alternative. And so, with no incentive to get clean or get help, the camps grow. Is this what we want as a community? Somehow, I don't think so. Officer Anaya pulled a man over who he clocked at 77mph heading westbound on Mill Plain. There was a FELONY WARRANT out for his arrest, but thanks to legislators and bureaucrats in our city, Jeff could do nothing except to issue yet another ticket that will likely never be paid. The man drove away. And so it went. Over and over, I watched Officer Anaya engage stressful situations with compassion and confidence. It was truly an honor to watch him do his job--and it was frustrating, too. At least twice, he would have opted to take an offender to jail for the safety of Vancouver citizens--but the law prevented him from doing so. The police can't do their job to keep you safe if the the city officials and State legislators tie their hands. And that's what's happening. Like the WA legislature, Vancouver's gone "woke," and soon, the evidence will be everywhere. Something tells me we will not like the results of such poor leadership. Is your voice being heard? Elections have consequences. Every citizen in CD-03 needs to know exactly who is on their City Council. We need to call these people and start asking questions. It's time to engage with our Mayors and our city management. We need to know how judges feel about supporting law enforcement officers and see who is willing to prosecute people who willfully break the law in our beautiful district. Every community needs leaders--people that our kids and grandkids can look up to. Law enforcement officers across CD-03 put their lives on the line every day to protect and serve the people of our area. They need our support. Public safety is public service, and that's what police work is all about. I'm committed to supporting our LEO's in whatever way that I can. We need to stand together and change the narrative that's being pushed about LEO's. The time is now. | | | | | A Special Thank You to Our Donors! Our second quarter fundraising efforts proved successful. We surpassed our goal and made a significant statement to the District. I could not have done this without you and for that I am eternally thankful. This is not just my fight. This is everyone's fight and every donation brings us closer to our goal of reclaiming our nation, our state and our community from those who seek to destroy all we hold dear. | | | | | | ---|--- | Join Our Team of Volunteers Helping with an election campaign brings the opportunity for leadership and training sure to get you "off the bench". clean_body: | | | | It’s time for integrity Friend, After all the irregularities in 2020, it's no wonder why so many Americans have trust in our elections! Democrats did everything they could to hide the fraud. Even now, the Radical Left continues to try to sneak bills through Congress and the Senate that make it easier to lie, cheat, and steal in our elections and call it “voting rights”. But the American People disagree! 88% of Americans believe our elections need voter ID! As Republicans, we have come together and fought for Election Integrity and we will continue to fight for it! Now more than ever, Alaska needs a Senator who will fight the Radical Left and their efforts. Lisa Murkowski won’t fight for election integrity, I WILL. But I need your support so we can DEFEAT her and the DC Insiders that are backing her campaign. Remember ONE person ONE vote. For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

subject: Does Trump still get your vote?

Fellow American,

Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly,**[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e655da76a9764a1ea6ad766a8c2293b3&_e=zYcRBQUGT30am18hGcmlYeuJvi_ZnOA9u2o8sNsoncvz7Skwj3LE7gHQ6pvqRfBkXCvZ8VuxQ8eegIHkPhzHj_SOih5pBeti8hq1Bb7-6Wlz4av9jkGK1MQiiTOOgEpIN5JDDWkRQHgFjN_9HSdvksUjCrwtMnOsiyOD34d4rkz8BRArSdtJwUIFTxVnRwTN9aWQz9qNi9ivJ0fbj2KaEh6UNPN1oVSRhHDl16Xa5QYv-1J_W5pE1JfWcrXyRS1af3eY9uelpiKiWY_Zbz326eMHoUkvNWNnHcSxV5WuudtLJ0IBrQI6j9SFKstKh2QzdKAU1WNW1WCrfndLYYo5FK3R43x0YNZz4i3qRhcTnkJeFb-QaMXT9_ZUqTx7WNTI6ta2TaRDooA0ZGT6galZZPLZIKGqZK-Oj84xkPrl7LG3U4uVOPwG56iLNrUmtVafjvjXX0wuXRV_ICluqOuc5A4Q2NAXuXkhBkRYB4Nyalz5nGvtjkKnEsA7IFdyrHSTtDX0C0JGQzvsIfRGY9AAZA%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 10,000 votes short. **

| | | | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b4f9d9a658&e=76fc145c69)

| | | Team We are heading into the General Election here in Virginia full steam ahead. We are excited to announce FOUR new candidates to add to the VAJD Squad:
---
|
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e4a732467d&e=76fc145c69)

[ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=183a9a06f5&e=76fc145c69)
---
| We have some great Democratic Nominees signing onto our platform of Social, Racial, Economic, and Environmental Justice here in Virginia. [We are up to 17 candidates right now who are on the ballot for November and we are always looking for more to come on board! ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cbdecb8f6d&e=76fc145c69)
**[Chip in whatever you can to help us elect these great Democrats ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=78d757bfdb&e=76fc145c69)**
---
| Just like Bridgette, Chance, Blakely, and Jasmine, there are a lot of progressive candidates that are counting on you to donate your time or donate your money to make sure that we can get these folks into the House! We have a slim margin in the Democratic Majority right now but we have a chance to grow that by backing candidates who champion our values and the policies working families need to have all over Virginia.
[Learn more on how you can help here.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cb9add8955&e=76fc145c69)
We are looking to you to help us out. We can't do this without you and our Democratic candidates can't either. If you can't donate your time,[ can you help us out by giving to our organization in our efforts in the upcoming election?](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=d313d60a9e&e=76fc145c69) Every bit can help, even just $5 a month.
In Solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9fc05dde0b&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")

| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. clean_body: We have to keep this seat blue! | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, We don’t have much time before our deadline at midnight, but we wanted to make sure you knew what’s at stake. | Gerrymandering hurts all of us -- and it’s no coincidence that Republicans are waiting on redistricting to try to replace a champion of the working class with another cookie-cutter Wall Street puppet. We must protect the progress we’ve made and work together to help Marcy keep her seat in Congress to continue the fight for Northern Ohio. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes.
